There is growing concern that these systems are complex, opaque and non-intuitive, and hence are difficult to trust. There has been a recent resurgence of interest in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) that aims to reduce the opacity of a model by explaining its behavior, its predictions or both, thus allowing humans to scrutinize and trust the model. A host of technical advances have been made and several explanation methods have been proposed in recent years that address the problem of model explainability and transparency. In this tutorial, we will present these novel explanation approaches, characterize their strengths and limitations, position existing work with respect to the database (DB) community, and enumerate opportunities for data management research in the context of XAI.
papers.abstract_zh: 算法决策系统已成功应用于各种领域的不同任务。尽管算法决策的潜在好处有很多，但信任这些系统的重要性直到最近才引起人们的关注。人们越来越担心这些系统复杂、不透明且不直观，因此难以信任。最近，人们对可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的兴趣重新兴起，旨在通过解释模型的行为、预测或两者兼而有之来降低模型的不透明性，从而使人类能够仔细检查和信任模型。近年来，已经取得了许多技术进步，并提出了几种解释方法来解决模型的可解释性和透明度问题。在本教程中，我们将介绍这些新颖的解释方法，描述它们的优点和局限性，定位数据库 (DB) 社区的现有工作，并列举 XAI 背景下数据管理研究的机会。

papers.title: Explaining Link Prediction Systems based on Knowledge Graph Embeddings.
papers.abstract: Link Prediction (LP) aims at tackling Knowledge Graph incompleteness by inferring new, missing facts from the already known ones. The rise of novel Machine Learning techniques has led researchers to develop LP models that represent Knowledge Graph elements as vectors in an embedding space. These models can outperform traditional approaches and they can be employed in multiple downstream tasks; nonetheless, they tend to be opaque, and are mostly regarded as black boxes. Their lack of interpretability limits our understanding of their inner mechanisms, and undermines the trust that users can place in them. In this paper, we propose the novel Kelpie explainability framework. Kelpie can be applied to any embedding-based LP models independently from their architecture, and it explains predictions by identifying the combinations of training facts that have enabled them. Kelpie can extract two complementary types of explanations, that we dub necessary and sufficient. We describe in detail both the structure and the implementation details of Kelpie, and thoroughly analyze its performance through extensive experiments. Our results show that Kelpie significantly outperforms baselines across almost all scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 链接预测（LP）旨在通过从已知事实中推断出新的、缺失的事实来解决知识图的不完整性问题。新颖的机器学习技术的兴起促使研究人员开发了 LP 模型，将知识图元素表示为嵌入空间中的向量。这些模型可以超越传统方法，并且可以用于多个下游任务；然而，它们往往是不透明的，并且大多被视为黑匣子。它们缺乏可解释性限制了我们对其内部机制的理解，并破坏了用户对它们的信任。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的凯尔派可解释性框架。 Kelpie 可以独立于其架构应用于任何基于嵌入的 LP 模型，并且它通过识别支持预测的训练事实的组合来解释预测。凯尔派可以提取两种互补类型的解释，我们称之为必要的和充分的。我们详细描述了Kelpie的结构和实现细节，并通过大量的实验彻底分析了其性能。我们的结果表明，Kelpie 在几乎所有场景中都显着优于基线。

papers.title: Fast Maximal Clique Enumeration on Uncertain Graphs: A Pivot-based Approach.
papers.abstract: Maximal clique enumeration on uncertain graphs is a fundamental problem in uncertain graph analysis. In this paper, we study a problem of enumerating all maximal (k,n)-cliques on an uncertain graph G, where a vertex set H of G is a maximal (k,n)-clique if (1) H (|H| ≥ k) is a clique with probability no less than n, and (2) H is a maximal vertex set satisfying (1). The state-of-the-art algorithms for enumerating all maximal (k,n)-cliques are based on a set enumeration technique which are often very costly. This is because the set enumeration based techniques may explore all subsets of a maximal (k,n)-clique, thus resulting in many unnecessary computations. To overcome this issue, we propose several novel and efficient pivot-based algorithms to enumerate all maximal (k,n)-cliques based on a newly-developed pivot-based pruning principle. Our pivot-based pruning principle is very general which can be applied to speed up the enumeration of any maximal subgraph that satisfies a hereditary property. Here the hereditary property means that if a maximal subgraph H satisfies a property P, any subgraph of H also meets P. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to systematically explore the idea of pivot for maximal clique enumeration on uncertain graphs. In addition, we also develop a nontrivial size-constraint based pruning technique and a new graph reduction technique to further improve the efficiency. Extensive experiments on nine real-world graphs demonstrate the efficiency, effectiveness, and scalability of the proposed algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 不确定图上的最大集团枚举是不确定图分析中的一个基本问题。在本文中，我们研究了在不确定图 G 上枚举所有最大 (k,n)-clique 的问题，其中 G 的顶点集 H 是最大 (k,n)-clique，如果 (1) H (|H| ≥ k) 是概率不小于 n 的 clique，并且 (2) H 是满足 (1) 的最大顶点集。用于枚举所有最大 (k,n) 派系的最先进算法基于通常非常昂贵的集合枚举技术。这是因为基于集合枚举的技术可能会探索最大(k,n)-集团的所有子集，从而导致许多不必要的计算。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了几种新颖且有效的基于枢轴的算法，以基于新开发的基于枢轴的剪枝原理来枚举所有最大（k，n）派。我们基于主元的剪枝原理非常通用，可以应用于加速任何满足遗传属性的最大子图的枚举。这里的遗传性意味着，如果最大子图 H 满足属性 P，则 H 的任何子图也满足 P。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个系统地探索不确定图上最大派枚举的枢轴思想的工作。此外，我们还开发了一种基于非平凡尺寸约束的剪枝技术和一种新的图缩减技术，以进一步提高效率。对九个真实世界图的广泛实验证明了所提出算法的效率、有效性和可扩展性。

papers.title: Faster and Better Solution to Embed Lp Metrics by Tree Metrics.
papers.abstract: Hierarchically Separated Tree (HST) is the most popular solution to embed a metric space into a tree metric. By using HSTs, many optimization problems, which are hard on defined metrics, become easier to get good approximation bounds with respect to the effectiveness, e.g., task assignment, trip planning, and facility location planning. Existing work focuses on constructing HSTs for arbitrary metric spaces, which makes a general-purpose algorithm take at least O(n2)-time to get tight distortion guarantees O(log(n)). Here, distortion is a prevalent measurement of HSTs' effectiveness and usability. However, we observe that (1) in many applications that HSTs are applied, only Lp metrics are used (e.g., Euclidean space), (2) the state-of-the-art solution is still time-consuming to construct HSTs for large-scale data, and (3) distortions of existing algorithms are only satisfactory for high-dimensional data. Thus, in this paper, we are motivated to study the Embedding Lp metrics through Tree metrics (ELT) problem. We aim to design a faster algorithm than O(n2) time to construct HSTs with not only O(log(n)) distortion guarantees but also good and robust empirical results. Specifically, we first present a divide-and-conquer based general framework and prove that it has a distortion guarantee of O(log(n)). To achieve a better time complexity than O(n2), we next design two optimization techniques: reducing to nearest neighbor search (by indexing) and sampling. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that our algorithm DCsam outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms by a large margin in terms of both distortion and running time.
papers.abstract_zh: 分层分离树 (HST) 是将度量空间嵌入到树度量中的最流行的解决方案。通过使用 HST，许多难以定义指标的优化问题变得更容易获得关于有效性的良好近似边界，例如任务分配、行程规划和设施位置规划。现有的工作重点是为任意度量空间构造 HST，这使得通用算法至少需要 O(n2) 时间才能获得严格的失真保证 O(log(n))。在这里，失真是 HST 有效性和可用性的普遍衡量标准。然而，我们观察到（1）在许多应用 HST 的应用中，仅使用 Lp 度量（例如欧几里德空间），（2）最先进的解决方案为大规模数据构建 HST 仍然非常耗时，（3）现有算法的失真仅适用于高维数据。因此，在本文中，我们有动力通过树度量（ELT）问题来研究嵌入 Lp 度量。我们的目标是设计一种比 O(n2) 时间更快的算法来构造 HST，不仅具有 O(log(n)) 失真保证，而且具有良好且稳健的经验结果。具体来说，我们首先提出一个基于分而治之的通用框架，并证明它具有 O(log(n)) 的失真保证。为了实现比 O(n2) 更好的时间复杂度，我们接下来设计两种优化技术：减少最近邻搜索（通过索引）和采样。最后，大量的实验表明，我们的算法 DCsam 在失真和运行时间方面都大大优于最先进的算法。

papers.title: FiGO: Fine-Grained Query Optimization in Video Analytics.
papers.abstract:
Video database management systems (VDBMSs) enable automated analysis of videos at scale using computationally-intensive deep learning models. To reduce the computational overhead of these models, researchers have proposed two techniques: (1) leveraging a specialized, lightweight model to filter out irrelevant frames or to directly answer the query, and (2) using a cascade of models of increasing complexity to answer the query. For both techniques, the query optimizer generates a coarse-grained query plan for the entire video. These techniques suffer from four limitations: (1) lower query accuracy over hard-to-detect predicates, (2) lower filtering efficacy with frequently-occurring objects, (3) lower accuracy due to nontrivial model cascade configuration, and (4) missed optimization opportunities due to coarse-grained planning for the entire video.

In this paper, we present FiGO to tackle these limitations. The design of FiGO is centered around three techniques. First, it uses an ensemble of models to support a range of throughput-accuracy tradeoffs. Second, it adopts a fine-grained approach to query optimization. It processes different chunks of the video using different models in the given ensemble to meet the user's accuracy requirement. Lastly, it uses a lightweight technique to prune the model ensemble to lower the query optimization time. We empirically show that these techniques enable FiGO to outperform the state-of-the-art systems for processing queries over videos by 3.3x on average across four video datasets.
papers.abstract_zh:
视频数据库管理系统 (VDBMS) 可使用计算密集型深度学习模型对大规模视频进行自动分析。为了减少这些模型的计算开销，研究人员提出了两种技术：（1）利用专门的轻量级模型来过滤掉不相关的帧或直接回答查询，以及（2）使用复杂性不断增加的级联模型来回答查询。对于这两种技术，查询优化器都会为整个视频生成粗粒度的查询计划。这些技术存在四个局限性：（1）对难以检测的谓词的查询准确性较低，（2）对频繁出现的对象的过滤效率较低，（3）由于不平凡的模型级联配置而导致准确性较低，以及（4）由于整个视频的粗粒度规划而错过了优化机会。

在本文中，我们提出 FiGO 来解决这些限制。 FiGO 的设计围绕三种技术展开。首先，它使用模型集合来支持一系列吞吐量与准确性的权衡。其次，它采用细粒度的方法来进行查询优化。它使用给定集合中的不同模型来处理视频的不同块，以满足用户的准确性要求。最后，它使用轻量级技术来修剪模型集合，以降低查询优化时间。我们的经验表明，这些技术使 FiGO 在四个视频数据集上处理视频查询的性能平均比最先进的系统高出 3.3 倍。

papers.title: FILA: Online Auditing of Machine Learning Model Accuracy under Finite Labelling Budget.
papers.abstract:
Machine learning (ML) is increasingly adopted in industrial applications. Typically, a ML pipeline is instantiated to automate the process of collecting training data, training a model, auditing the model accuracy and generating predictions.

In this paper we present a sampling based approach to audit the model accuracy in ML pipelines in an online manner, with general applicability, including entity resolution. We target an online setting in which a deployed model makes predictions, which can be selectively assessed for accuracy by humans in the loop. We present a consistent adaptive stratified sampling estimator for model accuracy and propose the Finite Labels (FILA) method to allocate samples under a finite label budget. We demonstrate that under mild statistical assumptions FILA is asymptotically optimal. We analyze the variance of the estimator under a finite labelling budget and compare our approach to other applicable techniques and analytically establish the conditions under which our proposed FILA is the method of choice. We also present an algorithm based on Thompson Sampling, named FILA-Thompson, utilizing explore-exploit trade-offs to estimate model accuracy.

Finally we present the results of a thorough experimental evaluation using real benchmark data sets demonstrating the practical utility (in terms of estimation accuracy and variance minimization under finite samples) of our proposals compared to other applicable approaches.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习 (ML) 越来越多地在工业应用中采用。通常，机器学习管道会被实例化，以自动执行收集训练数据、训练模型、审核模型准确性和生成预测的过程。

在本文中，我们提出了一种基于采样的方法，以在线方式审核机器学习管道中的模型准确性，具有普遍适用性，包括实体解析。我们的目标是在线环境，其中部署的模型可以进行预测，循环中的人员可以有选择地评估预测的准确性。我们提出了一种一致的自适应分层采样估计器来提高模型精度，并提出有限标签（FILA）方法来在有限标签预算下分配样本。我们证明，在温和的统计假设下，FILA 是渐近最优的。我们分析了有限标签预算下估计量的方差，并将我们的方法与其他适用技术进行比较，并分析确定我们提出的 FILA 是首选方法的条件。我们还提出了一种基于汤普森采样的算法，名为 FILA-Thompson，利用探索-利用权衡来估计模型准确性。

最后，我们展示了使用真实基准数据集进行彻底实验评估的结果，证明了我们的建议与其他适用方法相比的实际效用（在有限样本下的估计精度和方差最小化方面）。

papers.title: Finding Label and Model Errors in Perception Data With Learned Observation Assertions.
papers.abstract:
ML is being deployed in complex, real-world scenarios where errors have impactful consequences. In these systems, thorough testing of the ML pipelines is critical. A key component in ML deployment pipelines is the curation of labeled training data. Common practice in the ML literature assumes that labels are the ground truth. However, in our experience in a large autonomous vehicle development center, we have found that vendors can often provide erroneous labels, which can lead to downstream safety risks in trained models.

To address these issues, we propose a new abstraction, learned observation assertions, and implement it in a system called Fixy. Fixy leverages existing organizational resources, such as existing (possibly noisy) labeled datasets or previously trained ML models, to learn a probabilistic model for finding errors in human- or model-generated labels. Given user-provided features and these existing resources, Fixy learns feature distributions that specify likely and unlikely values (e.g., that a speed of 30mph is likely but 300mph is unlikely). It then uses these feature distributions to score labels for potential errors. We show that Fixy can automatically rank potential errors in real datasets with up to 2x higher precision compared to recent work on model assertions and standard techniques such as uncertainty sampling. Furthermore, Fixy can uncover labeling errors in 70% of scenes in a popular autonomous vehicle dataset.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习正在部署在复杂的现实场景中，在这些场景中，错误会产生严重后果。在这些系统中，对机器学习管道进行彻底测试至关重要。机器学习部署管道中的一个关键组成部分是标记训练数据的管理。机器学习文献中的常见做法假设标签是基本事实。然而，根据我们在大型自动驾驶汽车开发中心的经验，我们发现供应商经常会提供错误的标签，这可能会导致训练模型中的下游安全风险。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的抽象，学习观察断言，并在名为 Fixy 的系统中实现它。 Fixy 利用现有的组织资源，例如现有的（可能有噪声的）标记数据集或之前训练的 ML 模型，来学习用于查找人类或模型生成的标签中的错误的概率模型。给定用户提供的特征和这些现有资源，Fixi 会学习指定可能值和不太可能值的特征分布（例如，速度可能为 30 英里/小时，但不太可能达到 300 英里/小时）。然后，它使用这些特征分布对潜在错误的标签进行评分。我们证明，与模型断言和不确定性采样等标准技术的最新研究相比，Fixy 可以自动对真实数据集中的潜在错误进行排名，精度高达 2 倍。此外，Fixi 可以发现流行的自动驾驶车辆数据集中 70% 的场景中的标签错误。

papers.title: FuseME: Distributed Matrix Computation Engine based on Cuboid-based Fused Operator and Plan Generation.
papers.abstract: Operator fusion is essentially and widely used in a large number of matrix computation systems in science and industry. The existing distributed operator fusion methods focus on only either low communication cost with the risk of out of memory or large-scale processing with high communication cost. We propose a distributed elastic fused operator called Cuboid-based Fused Operator (CFO) that achieves both low communication cost and large-scale processing. We also propose a novel fusion plan generator called Cuboid-based Fusion plan Generator (CFG) that finds a fusion plan to fuse more operators including large-scale matrix multiplication. We implement a fast distributed matrix computation engine called FuseME by integrating both CFO and CFG seamlessly. FuseME outperforms the state-of-the-art systems including SystemDS by orders of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: 算子融合本质上广泛应用于科学和工业领域的大量矩阵计算系统中。现有的分布式算子融合方法仅关注具有内存不足风险的低通信成本或具有高通信成本的大规模处理。我们提出了一种分布式弹性融合算子，称为基于长方体的融合算子（CFO），它可以实现低通信成本和大规模处理。我们还提出了一种新颖的融合计划生成器，称为基于长方体的融合计划生成器（CFG），它找到一个融合计划来融合更多算子，包括大规模矩阵乘法。我们通过无缝集成 CFO 和 CFG 来实现名为 FuseME 的快速分布式矩阵计算引擎。 FuseME 的性能优于包括 SystemDS 在内的最先进系统几个数量级。

papers.title: GaccO - A GPU-accelerated OLTP DBMS.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present GaccO - a main memory DBMS for GPU-accelerated OLTP. For executing OLTP workloads, GaccO implements a novel scheme that splits the execution across the CPU and the GPU. Using such a co-execution scheme GaccO can thus not only efficiently make use of the vectorized execution of the GPU by grouping transactions of the same type into batches, but it can also support databases larger than device memory by leveraging CPU memory in addition to the GPU memory. In our evaluation with TPC-C, we show that GaccO can thus speed-up OLTP workloads by up to 6 times compared to a pure CPU-based OLTP execution.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 GaccO - 用于 GPU 加速 OLTP 的主内存 DBMS。为了执行 OLTP 工作负载，GaccO 实施了一种新颖的方案，将执行拆分到 CPU 和 GPU 上。使用这种共同执行方案，GaccO不仅可以通过将相同类型的事务分组来有效地利用GPU的矢量化执行，而且还可以通过利用CPU内存和GPU内存来支持大于设备内存的数据库。在我们对 TPC-C 的评估中，我们表明，与纯粹基于 CPU 的 OLTP 执行相比，GaccO 可以将 OLTP 工作负载速度提高多达 6 倍。

papers.title: Generating Interpretable Data-Based Explanations for Fairness Debugging using Gopher.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) models, while increasingly being used to make life-altering decisions, are known to reinforce systemic bias and discrimination. Consequently, practitioners and model developers need tools to facilitate debugging for bias in ML models. We introduce Gopher, a system that generates compact, interpretable and causal explanations for ML model bias. Gopher identifies the top-k coherent subsets of the training data that are root causes for model bias by quantifying the extent to which removing or updating a subset can resolve the bias. We describe the architecture of Gopher and will walk the audience through real-world use cases to highlight how Gopher generates explanations that enable data scientists to understand how subsets of the training data contribute to the bias of a machine learning (ML) model. Gopher is available as open-source software; The code and the demonstration video are available at https://gopher-sys.github.io/.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型虽然越来越多地被用来做出改变生活的决策，但众所周知，它会加剧系统性偏见和歧视。因此，从业者和模型开发人员需要工具来促进机器学习模型中偏差的调试。我们引入了 Gopher，这是一个为 ML 模型偏差生成紧凑、可解释和因果解释的系统。 Gopher 通过量化删除或更新子集可以解决偏差的程度来识别训练数据的前 k 个相干子集，这些子集是模型偏差的根本原因。我们描述了 Gopher 的架构，并将引导观众了解现实世界的用例，以重点介绍 Gopher 如何生成解释，使数据科学家能够了解训练数据的子集如何影响机器学习 (ML) 模型的偏差。 Gopher 可作为开源软件使用；代码和演示视频可在 https://gopher-sys.github.io/ 上获取。

papers.title: GHive: A Demonstration of GPU-Accelerated Query Processing in Apache Hive.
papers.abstract: As a distributed, fault-tolerant data warehouse system for large-scale data analytics, Apache Hive has been used for various applications in many organizations (e.g., Facebook, Amazon, and Huawei). Exploiting the large degrees of parallelism of GPU to improve the performance of online analytical processing (OLAP) in database system is a common practice in the industry. Meanwhile, it is a common practice to exploit the large degrees of parallelism of GPU to improve the performance of online analytical processing (OLAP) in database systems. This demo presents GHive, which enables Apache Hive to accelerate OLAP queries by jointly utilizing CPU and GPU in intelligent and efficient ways. The takeaways for SIGMOD attendees include: (1) the superior performance of GHive compared with vanilla Hive that only uses CPU; (2) intuitive visualizations of execution statistics for Hive and GHive to understand where the acceleration of GHive comes from; (3) detailed profiling of the time taken by each operator on CPU and GPU to show the advantages of GPU execution.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一种用于大规模数据分析的分布式、容错数据仓库系统，Apache Hive 已在许多组织（例如 Facebook、亚马逊和华为）中用于各种应用程序。利用GPU的大程度并行性来提高数据库系统中的在线分析处理（OLAP）性能是业界的常见做法。同时，利用GPU的高度并行性来提高数据库系统中在线分析处理（OLAP）的性能是一种常见的做法。该演示展示了 GHive，它使 Apache Hive 能够以智能且高效的方式联合利用 CPU 和 GPU 来加速 OLAP 查询。 SIGMOD 与会者的收获包括：(1) GHive 与仅使用 CPU 的普通 Hive 相比具有卓越的性能； （2）Hive和GHive的执行统计数据直观可视化，了解GHive的加速从何而来； (3)详细分析每个算子在CPU和GPU上所花费的时间，以显示GPU执行的优势。

papers.title: Givens QR Decomposition over Relational Databases.
papers.abstract:
This paper introduces Figaro, an algorithm for computing the upper-triangular matrix in the QR decomposition of the matrix defined by the natural join over a relational database. The QR decomposition lies at the core of many linear algebra techniques and their machine learning applications, including: the matrix inverse; the least squares; the singular value decomposition; eigenvalue problems; and the principal component analysis.

Figaro's main novelty is that it pushes the QR decomposition past the join. This leads to several desirable properties. For acyclic joins, it takes time linear in the database size and independent of the join size. Its execution is equivalent to the application of a sequence of Givens rotations proportional to the join size. Its number of rounding errors relative to the classical QR decomposition algorithms is on par with the input size relative to the join size.

In experiments with real-world and synthetic databases, Figaro outperforms both in runtime performance and accuracy the LAPACK libraries openblas and Intel MKL by a factor proportional to the gap between the join output and input sizes.
papers.abstract_zh:
本文介绍 Figaro，一种用于在关系数据库上的自然连接定义的矩阵 QR 分解中计算上三角矩阵的算法。 QR 分解是许多线性代数技术及其机器学习应用的核心，包括： 矩阵逆；最小二乘法；奇异值分解；特征值问题；以及主成分分析。

Figaro 的主要新颖之处在于它将 QR 分解推过了连接。这导致了一些理想的特性。对于非循环连接，所需时间与数据库大小成线性关系，并且与连接大小无关。它的执行相当于应用一系列与连接大小成比例的吉文斯旋转。其相对于经典 QR 分解算法的舍入误差数量与相对于连接大小的输入大小相当。

在使用真实数据库和合成数据库进行的实验中，Figaro 在运行时性能和准确性方面均优于 LAPACK 库 openblas 和 Intel MKL，其性能与连接输出和输入大小之间的差距成正比。

papers.title: Gloria: Graph-based Sharing Optimizer for Event Trend Aggregation.
papers.abstract: Large workloads of event trend aggregation queries are widely deployed to derive high-level insights about current event trends in near real time. To speed-up the execution, we identify and leverage sharing opportunities from complex patterns with flat Kleene operators or even nested Kleene expressions. We propose Gloria, a graph-based sharing optimizer for event trend aggregation. First, we map the sharing optimization problem to a graph path search problem in the Gloria graph with execution costs encoded as weights. Second, we shrink the search space by applying cost-driven pruning principles that guarantee optimality of the reduced Gloria graph in most cases. Lastly, we propose a path search algorithm that identifies the sharing plan with minimum execution costs. Our experimental study on three real-world data sets demonstrates that our Gloria optimizer effectively reduces the search space, leading to 5-fold speed-up in optimization time. The optimized plan consistently reduces the query latency by 68%-93% compared to the plan generated by state-of-the-art approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 事件趋势聚合查询的大量工作负载被广泛部署，以近乎实时地获取有关当前事件趋势的高级见解。为了加快执行速度，我们通过平面 Kleene 运算符甚至嵌套 Kleene 表达式来识别和利用复杂模式中的共享机会。我们提出了 Gloria，一种基于图的共享优化器，用于事件趋势聚合。首先，我们将共享优化问题映射到 Gloria 图中的图路径搜索问题，并将执行成本编码为权重。其次，我们通过应用成本驱动的修剪原则来缩小搜索空间，以保证在大多数情况下简化的 Gloria 图的最优性。最后，我们提出了一种路径搜索算法，以最小的执行成本识别共享计划。我们对三个真实数据集的实验研究表明，我们的 Gloria 优化器有效地减少了搜索空间，从而使优化时间加快了 5 倍。与最先进的方法生成的计划相比，优化的计划始终将查询延迟减少了 68%-93%。

papers.title: GRADES-NDA'22: 5th International Workshop on Graph Data management Experiences and Systems (GRADES) and Network Data Analytics (NDA).
papers.abstract: GRADES-NDA is the premier workshop on graph data management and analytics that aims to bring together researchers from academia, industry, and government. GRADES-NDA'22 is a forum for discussing recent advances in (large-scale) graph data management and analytics systems, as well as propose and discuss novel methods and techniques towards addressing domain specific challenges or handling noise in real-world graphs. In 2022, GRADES-NDA is in its fifth edition.
papers.abstract_zh: GRADES-NDA 是图形数据管理和分析领域的顶级研讨会，旨在汇集来自学术界、工业界和政府的研究人员。 GRADES-NDA'22 是一个讨论（大规模）图形数据管理和分析系统最新进展的论坛，并提出和讨论解决特定领域挑战或处理现实世界图形中噪声的新颖方法和技术。 2022 年，GRADES-NDA 推出第五版。

papers.title: Graph Pattern Matching in GQL and SQL/PGQ.
papers.abstract:
As graph databases become widespread, the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) have approved a project to create GQL, a standard property graph query language. This complements the SQL/PGQ project, which specifies how to define graph views over a SQL tabular schema, and to run read-only queries against them.

Both projects have been assigned to the ISO/IEC JTC1 SC32 working group for Database Languages, WG3, which continues to maintain and enhance SQL as a whole. This common responsibility helps enforce a policy that the identical core of both PGQ and GQL is a graph pattern matching sub-language, here termed GPML. The WG3 design process is also analyzed by an academic working group, part of the Linked Data Benchmark Council (LDBC), whose task is to produce a formal semantics of these graph data languages, which complements their standard specifications.

This paper, written by members of WG3 and LDBC, presents the key elements of the GPML of SQL/PGQ and GQL in advance of the publication of these new standards.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着图数据库的普及，国际标准化组织 (ISO) 和国际电工委员会 (IEC) 批准了一个创建 GQL 的项目，这是一种标准属性图查询语言。这补充了 SQL/PGQ 项目，该项目指定如何在 SQL 表格模式上定义图形视图，并针对它们运行只读查询。

这两个项目均已分配给 ISO/IEC JTC1 SC32 数据库语言工作组 WG3，该工作组将继续维护和增强 SQL 的整体功能。这种共同的责任有助于强制实施这样的政策：PGQ 和 GQL 的相同核心都是图形模式匹配子语言，此处称为 GPML。 WG3 设计过程还由隶属于关联数据基准委员会 (LDBC) 的学术工作组进行分析，其任务是生成这些图形数据语言的正式语义，以补充其标准规范。

本文由 WG3 和 LDBC 成员撰写，在这些新标准发布之前介绍了 SQL/PGQ 和 GQL 的 GPML 的关键要素。

papers.title: GraphZeppelin: Storage-Friendly Sketching for Connected Components on Dynamic Graph Streams.
papers.abstract:
Finding the connected components of a graph is a fundamental problem with uses throughout computer science and engineering. The task of computing connected components becomes more difficult when graphs are very large, or when they are dynamic, meaning the edge set changes over time subject to a stream of edge insertions and deletions. A natural approach to computing the connected components on a large, dynamic graph stream is to buy enough RAM to store the entire graph. However, the requirement that the graph fit in RAM is prohibitive for very large graphs. Thus, there is an unmet need for systems that can process dense dynamic graphs, especially when those graphs are larger than available RAM.

We present a new high-performance streaming graph-processing system for computing the connected components of a graph. This system, which we call GraphZeppelin, uses new linear sketching data structures (CubeSketch) to solve the streaming connected components problem and as a result requires space asymptotically smaller than the space required for a lossless representation of the graph. GraphZeppelin is optimized for massive dense graphs: GraphZeppelin can process millions of edge updates (both insertions and deletions) per second, even when the underlying graph is far too large to fit in available RAM. As a result GraphZeppelin vastly increases the scale of graphs that can be processed.
papers.abstract_zh:
查找图的连通部分是整个计算机科学和工程中使用的一个基本问题。当图非常大或动态时，计算连通分量的任务变得更加困难，这意味着边集随着时间的推移而变化，受到边插入和删除流的影响。在大型动态图流上计算连接组件的自然方法是购买足够的 RAM 来存储整个图。然而，对于非常大的图来说，图适合 RAM 的要求是令人望而却步的。因此，对能够处理密集动态图的系统的需求尚未得到满足，特别是当这些图大于可用 RAM 时。

我们提出了一种新的高性能流图处理系统，用于计算图的连接组件。这个系统，我们称之为 GraphZeppelin，使用新的线性草图数据结构 (CubeSketch) 来解决流连接组件问题，因此需要的空间渐近小于图的无损表示所需的空间。 GraphZeppelin 针对大规模密集图进行了优化：GraphZeppelin 每秒可以处理数百万次边缘更新（插入和删除），即使底层图太大而无法容纳可用 RAM 时也是如此。因此，GraphZeppelin 极大地增加了可处理的图形规模。

papers.title: Halo: A Hybrid PMem-DRAM Persistent Hash Index with Fast Recovery.
papers.abstract:
Hash index, a fundamental component in many data management systems, can benefit from the emerging persistent memory (PMem) to achieve high performance and instant recovery. However, existing persistent hash indexes are suboptimal in at least three aspects. First, their performance suffers from the mismatch between small random write and access granularity of PMem hardware. Second, none of them are aware of the significance of write amplification caused by memory allocators and synchronization primitives. Third, hybrid designs (PMem+DRAM) focus on improving throughput at the cost of extremely long recovery time.

In this paper, we present the design and implementation of Halo, a hybrid hash index for PMem+DRAM environment, featuring a specifically designed volatile index and log-structured persistent storage layout. In order to suppress write amplification caused by memory allocators and to facilitate recovery, we propose Halloc, a highly-efficient memory manager for Halo. In addition, we propose mechanisms such as batched writes, prefetching for hybrid reads, and reactive snapshot to further optimize performance. We conduct extensive evaluations on a 32-core platform equipped with Intel Optane DC Persistent Memory Modules. The results show that Halo achieves up to 17.5x and 81.2x higher read and write throughput than state-of-the-art hash indexes under a wide range of workloads. Halo also outperforms current hybrid designs in recovery speed, which is 1 to 2 orders of magnitude faster.
papers.abstract_zh:
哈希索引是许多数据管理系统的基本组件，它可以受益于新兴的持久内存（PMem）来实现高性能和即时恢复。然而，现有的持久哈希索引至少在三个方面不是最理想的。首先，它们的性能受到 PMem 硬件的小随机写入和访问粒度之间不匹配的影响。其次，他们都没有意识到内存分配器和同步原语引起的写放大的重要性。第三，混合设计（PMem+DRAM）专注于提高吞吐量，但代价是极长的恢复时间。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Halo 的设计和实现，这是一种适用于 PMem+DRAM 环境的混合哈希索引，具有专​​门设计的易失性索引和日志结构的持久存储布局。为了抑制内存分配器引起的写放大并促进恢复，我们提出了 Halo 的高效内存管理器 Halloc。此外，我们还提出了批量写入、混合读取预取和反应式快照等机制，以进一步优化性能。我们在配备英特尔傲腾 DC 持久内存模块的 32 核平台上进行了广泛的评估。结果表明，在各种工作负载下，Halo 的读写吞吐量比最先进的哈希索引高出 17.5 倍和 81.2 倍。 Halo 在恢复速度方面也优于当前的混合设计，快了 1 到 2 个数量级。

papers.title: HAP: An Efficient Hamming Space Index Based on Augmented Pigeonhole Principle.
papers.abstract:
The emerging deep learning techniques prefer mapping complex data objects (e.g., images, documents) to compact binary vectors (i.e., hash codes) for efficient similarity search. In this paper, we study the problem of indexing large-scale binary databases to support fast Hamming distance-based similarity queries. Existing Hamming space indices usually divide long binary vectors into short disjoint pieces and apply the Pigeonhole Principle to prune unnecessary candidates. In our work, we relax the disjoint partition constraint by allowing dimension redundancy, which yields a tighter pruning bound named Augmented Pigeonhole Principle (APP). Intuitively, APP enables more optimization opportunities by capturing the correlation between database and query workloads. Based on APP, we propose HAP, an efficient Hamming space index framework to support both Hamming range queries and k-NN queries.

To guide index construction and run-time query optimization, we introduce a novel DL-base query cardinality estimator named SimCardNet. To further reduce the index space cost, we propose a learned index compression scheme by combining the piece-wise linear approximation (PLA) and Elias-Fano encoding. In addition, we also study the problem of optimizing the execution time of a batch of queries using our index framework. The experimental results on large-scale binary databases reveal that our indexing scheme outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in terms of both space and time efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
新兴的深度学习技术更喜欢将复杂的数据对象（例如图像、文档）映射到紧凑的二进制向量（即哈希码）以进行有效的相似性搜索。在本文中，我们研究了索引大规模二进制数据库以支持基于快速汉明距离的相似性查询的问题。现有的汉明空间索引通常将长的二元向量划分为短的不相交片段，并应用鸽洞原理来修剪不必要的候选者。在我们的工作中，我们通过允许维度冗余来放松不相交分区约束，这会产生更严格的剪枝界限，称为增强鸽子洞原理（APP）。直观地说，APP 通过捕获数据库和查询工作负载之间的相关性来实现更多的优化机会。基于APP，我们提出了HAP，一种高效的汉明空间索引框架，支持汉明范围查询和k-NN查询。

为了指导索引构建和运行时查询优化，我们引入了一种新颖的基于 DL 的查询基数估计器，名为 SimCardNet。为了进一步降低索引空间成本，我们通过结合分段线性近似（PLA）和 Elias-Fano 编码提出了一种学习索引压缩方案。此外，我们还研究了使用索引框架优化一批查询的执行时间的问题。大规模二进制数据库的实验结果表明，我们的索引方案在空间和时间效率方面都优于最先进的基线。

papers.title: HET-GMP: A Graph-based System Approach to Scaling Large Embedding Model Training.
papers.abstract: Embedding models have been recognized as an effective learning paradigm for high-dimensional data. However, a major embedding model training obstacle is that updating and retrieving the shared large-scale embedding parameters usually dominates the distributed training cycle, leading to significant scalability issues. This paper presents HET-GMP, a distributed system on training embedding models. Uniquely, HET-GMP takes advantage of a graph-based approach to efficiently increase scalability. The key insight guiding our design is the "graph way of thinking". HET-GMP creates a bigraph abstraction to represent the access relationships between data samples and embedding vectors. This enables HET-GMP to embrace graph locality and skewness as new performance opportunities and to exploit graph-based replication/partitioning and bounded-asynchronous synchronization to reduce communication overhead. We evaluate the system on the embedding models for click-through rate (CTR) prediction, which presents the most significant challenge and communication bottleneck due to heavy access concurrency to a huge embedding table. The result shows that HET-GMP supports embedding model training with 1011 parameters, achieving a reduction in communication up to 87.5% and an up-to 27.5x speedup over the state-of-the-art baseline systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入模型已被认为是高维数据的有效学习范例。然而，嵌入模型训练的一个主要障碍是更新和检索共享的大规模嵌入参数通常主导分布式训练周期，导致严重的可扩展性问题。本文提出了 HET-GMP，一种训练嵌入模型的分布式系统。独特的是，HET-GMP 利用基于图的方法来有效提高可扩展性。指导我们设计的关键洞察是“图形思维方式”。 HET-GMP 创建一个双图抽象来表示数据样本和嵌入向量之间的访问关系。这使得 HET-GMP 能够将图局部性和偏斜性作为新的性能机会，并利用基于图的复制/分区和有界异步同步来减少通信开销。我们在用于点击率（CTR）预测的嵌入模型上评估系统，由于对巨大嵌入表的大量访问并发，这提出了最重大的挑战和通信瓶颈。结果表明，HET-GMP 支持具有 1011 个参数的嵌入模型训练，与最先进的基线系统相比，通信量减少高达 87.5%，加速高达 27.5 倍。

papers.title: HiEngine: How to Architect a Cloud-Native Memory-Optimized Database Engine.
papers.abstract:
Fast database engines have become an essential building block in many systems and applications. Yet most of them are designed based on on-premise solutions and do not directly work in the cloud. Existing cloud-native database systems are mostly disk resident databases that follow a storage-centric design and exploit the potential of modern cloud infrastructure, such as manycore processors, large main memory and persistent memory. However, in-memory databases are infrequent and untapped.

This paper presents HiEngine, Huawei's cloud-native memory-optimized in-memory database engine that endows hierarchical database architecture and fills this gap. HiEngine simultaneously (1) leverages the cloud infrastructure with reliable storage services on the compute-side (in addition to the storage tier) for fast persistence and reliability, (2) achieves main-memory database engines' high performance, and (3) retains backward compatibility with existing cloud-native database systems. HiEngine is integrated with Huawei GaussDB(for MySQL), it brings the benefits of main-memory database engines to the cloud and co-exists with disk-based engines. Compared to conventional systems, HiEngine outperforms prior storage-centric solutions by up to 7.5X and provides comparable performance to on-premise memory-optimized database engines.
papers.abstract_zh:
快速数据库引擎已成为许多系统和应用程序中的重要构建块。然而，它们大多数都是基于本地解决方案设计的，并不直接在云中工作。现有的云原生数据库系统大多是磁盘驻留数据库，遵循以存储为中心的设计，并利用现代云基础设施的潜力，例如多核处理器、大容量主内存和持久内存。然而，内存数据库并不常见且尚未开发。

本文提出的HiEngine是华为云原生内存优化的内存数据库引擎，它赋予了分层数据库架构并填补了这一空白。 HiEngine 同时 (1) 利用云基础设施和计算端（除了存储层）的可靠存储服务来实现快速持久性和可靠性，(2) 实现主存数据库引擎的高性能，以及 (3) 保留与现有云原生数据库系统的向后兼容性。 HiEngine与华为GaussDB(for MySQL)集成，将主存数据库引擎的优势带到云端，并与基于磁盘的引擎共存。与传统系统相比，HiEngine 的性能比之前以存储为中心的解决方案高出 7.5 倍，并提供与本地内存优化数据库引擎相当的性能。

papers.title: Hierarchical Entity Resolution using an Oracle.
papers.abstract: In many applications, entity references (i.e., records) and entities need to be organized to capture diverse relationships like type-subtype, is-A (mapping entities to types), and duplicate (mapping records to entities) relationships. However, automatic identification of such relationships is often inaccurate due to noise and heterogeneous representation of records across sources. Similarly, manual maintenance of these relationships is infeasible and does not scale to large datasets. In this work, we circumvent these challenges by considering weak supervision in the form of an oracle to formulate a novel hierarchical ER task. In this setting, records are clustered in a tree-like structure containing records at leaf-level and capturing record-entity (duplicate), entity-type (is-A) and subtype-supertype relationships. For effective use of supervision, we leverage triplet comparison oracle queries that take three records as input and output the most similar pair(s). We develop HierER, a querying strategy that uses record pair similarities to minimize the number of oracle queries while maximizing the identified hierarchical structure. We show theoretically and empirically that HierER is effective under different similarity noise models and demonstrate empirically that HierER can scale up to million-size datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 在许多应用程序中，需要组织实体引用（即记录）和实体来捕获不同的关系，例如类型-子类型、is-A（将实体映射到类型）和重复（将记录映射到实体）关系。然而，由于噪声和跨源记录的异构表示，这种关系的自动识别通常是不准确的。同样，手动维护这些关系是不可行的，并且无法扩展到大型数据集。在这项工作中，我们通过考虑预言机形式的弱监督来制定新颖的分层 ER 任务来规避这些挑战。在此设置中，记录聚集在包含叶级记录并捕获记录实体（重复）、实体类型（is-A）和子类型-超类型关系的树状结构中。为了有效利用监督，我们利用三元组比较预言机查询，将三个记录作为输入并输出最相似的对。我们开发了 HierER，一种查询策略，它使用记录对相似性来最小化 Oracle 查询的数量，同时最大化所识别的层次结构。我们从理论上和经验上证明了 HierER 在不同的相似性噪声模型下是有效的，并通过经验证明了 HierER 可以扩展到百万级数据集。

papers.title: HILDA'22: The SIGMOD 2022 Workshop on Human-in-the-Loop Data Analytics.
papers.abstract: HILDA brings together researchers and practitioners to exchange ideas and results on human-data interaction. It explores how data management and analysis can be made more effective when taking into account the people who design and build these processes as well as those who are impacted by their results. We are trying to change things up a bit for HILDA 2022. There are now several good venues for the kind of work that HILDA has traditionally attracted. We plan to focus this year's workshop on early-stage research that is promising and exciting. A core part of this plan is that every paper gets a mentor. In this summary, we describe the workshop, its main areas of focus and our review and mentorship plan.
papers.abstract_zh: HILDA 将研究人员和从业者聚集在一起，交流有关人类数据交互的想法和结果。它探讨了在考虑设计和构建这些流程的人员以及受其结果影响的人员的情况下，如何使数据管理和分析更加有效。我们正在努力为 HILDA 2022 做出一些改变。现在有几个很好的场所可以开展 HILDA 传统上吸引的工作。我们计划将今年的研讨会重点放在有前景且令人兴奋的早期研究上。该计划的核心部分是每篇论文都有一位导师。在本摘要中，我们描述了研讨会、其主要关注领域以及我们的审查和指导计划。

papers.title: Hindering Influence Diffusion of Community.
papers.abstract: Considering the rapid spread of incidents like rumours or epidemics, it is important to hinder their influence diffusion. However, none of the existing works can well control the influence diffusion of a community. Based on a novel metric named interaction frequency that can measure the influence diffusion of a community, we aim to remove b nodes from a given community such that the interaction frequency of the remaining nodes is minimized. We also design a polynomial-time algorithm for the problem. The experiments show our algorithm can efficiently hinder the influence diffusion.
papers.abstract_zh: 考虑到谣言或流行病等事件的迅速传播，阻碍其影响力扩散很重要。然而，现有的工作都无法很好地控制社区的影响力扩散。基于一种名为交互频率的新指标，可以衡量社区的影响力扩散，我们的目标是从给定社区中删除 b 个节点，以使剩余节点的交互频率最小化。我们还为该问题设计了多项式时间算法。实验表明我们的算法可以有效地阻碍影响力扩散。

papers.title: HINT: A Hierarchical Index for Intervals in Main Memory.
papers.abstract: Indexing intervals is a fundamental problem, finding a wide range of applications, most notably in temporal and uncertain databases. In this paper, we propose HINT, a novel and efficient in-memory index for intervals, with a focus on interval overlap queries, which are a basic component of many search and analysis tasks. HINT applies a hierarchical partitioning approach, which assigns each interval to at most two partitions per level and has controlled space requirements. We reduce the information stored at each partition to the absolutely necessary by dividing the intervals in it based on whether they begin inside or before the partition boundaries. In addition, our index includes storage optimization techniques for the effective handling of data sparsity and skewness. Experimental results on real and synthetic interval sets of different characteristics show that HINT is typically one order of magnitude faster than existing interval indexing methods.
papers.abstract_zh: Indexing intervals is a fundamental problem, finding a wide range of applications, most notably in temporal and uncertain databases.在本文中，我们提出了 HINT，一种新颖且高效的区间内存索引，重点关注区间重叠查询，这是许多搜索和分析任务的基本组成部分。 HINT 采用分层分区方法，将每个间隔分配给每个级别最多两个分区，并控制空间要求。我们根据每个分区中的间隔是在分区边界之内还是之前开始来划分分区，从而将存储在每个分区中的信息减少到绝对必要的程度。此外，我们的索引包括用于有效处理数据稀疏性和偏斜性的存储优化技术。对不同特征的真实区间集和合成区间集的实验结果表明，HINT 通常比现有区间索引方法快一个数量级。

papers.title: How Good is My HTAP System?
papers.abstract: Hybrid Transactional and Analytical Processing (HTAP) systems have recently gained popularity as they combine OLAP and OLTP processing to reduce administrative and synchronization costs between dedicated systems. However, there is no precise characterization of the features that distinguish a good HTAP system from a poor one. In this paper, we seek to solve this problem from the perspectives of both performance and freshness. To simultaneously capture the performance of both transactional and analytical processing, we introduce a new concept called throughput frontier, which visualizes both transactional and analytical throughput in a single 2D graph. The throughput frontier can capture information regarding the performance of each engine, the interference between the two engines, and various system design decisions. To capture how well an HTAP system supports real-time analytics, we define a freshness metric which quantifies how recent is the snapshot of the data seen by each analytical query. We also develop a practical way to measure freshness in a real system. We design a new hybrid benchmark called HATtrick which incorporates both throughput frontier and freshness as metrics. Using the benchmark, we evaluate three representative HTAP systems under various data size and system configurations and demonstrate how the metrics reveal important system characteristics and performance information.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合事务和分析处理 (HTAP) 系统最近受到欢迎，因为它们结合了 OLAP 和 OLTP 处理，以减少专用系统之间的管理和同步成本。然而，对于区分好的 HTAP 系统和差的 HTAP 系统的特征，并没有精确的描述。在本文中，我们试图从性能和新鲜度两个角度来解决这个问题。为了同时捕获事务和分析处理的性能，我们引入了一个称为吞吐量前沿的新概念，它在单个二维图中可视化事务和分析吞吐量。吞吐量边界可以捕获有关每个引擎的性能、两个引擎之间的干扰以及各种系统设计决策的信息。为了了解 HTAP 系统对实时分析的支持程度，我们定义了一个新鲜度指标，该指标量化每个分析查询所看到的数据快照的最新程度。我们还开发了一种实用的方法来测量真实系统中的新鲜度。我们设计了一个名为 HATtrick 的新混合基准，它将吞吐量前沿和新鲜度作为指标。使用该基准，我们评估了不同数据大小和系统配置下的三个代表性 HTAP 系统，并演示了这些指标如何揭示重要的系统特征和性能信息。

papers.title: HTAP Databases: What is New and What is Next.
papers.abstract: Processing the mixed workloads of transactions and analytical queries in a single database system can eliminate the ETL process and enable real-time data analysis on the transaction data. However, there is no free lunch. Such systems must balance the trade-off between workload isolation and data freshness due to interweaving workloads of OLTP and OLAP. Since Gartner coined the term, Hybrid Transactional/Analytical Processing (HTAP), we have witnessed the emergence of various database systems to support HTAP. One common feature is that they leverage the best of row store and column store to achieve high quality of HTAP. As they have disparate storage strategies and processing techniques to satisfy the requirements of various HTAP applications, it is essential to understand, compare, and evaluate their key techniques. In this tutorial, we offer a comprehensive survey of HTAP databases. We introduce a taxonomy of state-of-the-art HTAP databases according to their storage strategies and architectures. We then take a deep dive into their key techniques regarding transaction processing, analytical processing, data synchronization, query optimization, and resource scheduling. We also introduce existing HTAP benchmarks. Finally, we discuss the research challenges and open problems for HTAP.
papers.abstract_zh: 在单个数据库系统中处理事务和分析查询的混合工作负载可以消除 ETL 过程并实现对事务数据的实时数据分析。然而，天下没有免费的午餐。由于 OLTP 和 OLAP 工作负载交织在一起，此类系统必须在工作负载隔离和数据新鲜度之间进行权衡。自从 Gartner 创造了混合事务/分析处理（HTAP）这个术语以来，我们见证了各种支持 HTAP 的数据库系统的出现。一个共同的特点是它们利用行存储和列存储的优点来实现高质量的 HTAP。由于它们具有不同的存储策略和处理技术来满足各种 HTAP 应用程序的要求，因此了解、比较和评估它们的关键技术至关重要。在本教程中，我们对 HTAP 数据库进行了全面的调查。我们根据存储策略和架构对最先进的 HTAP 数据库进行分类。然后，我们深入研究他们在事务处理、分析处理、数据同步、查询优化和资源调度方面的关键技术。我们还介绍了现有的 HTAP 基准测试。最后，我们讨论了 HTAP 的研究挑战和未解决的问题。

papers.title: HUNTER: An Online Cloud Database Hybrid Tuning System for Personalized Requirements.
papers.abstract: Recently, using machine learning for performance tuning of cloud database (CDB) service has shown great potentials. However, facing personalized requirements such as various restrictions for tuning with very different workloads, pre-trained models may mismatch or recommend suboptimal configurations given a new workload. On the other hand, if the system tunes configurations in an online fashion, the system will suffer from the cold start problem, resulting in long tuning time and performance fluctuation. To accommodate these problems, we propose an online CDB tuning system called HUNTER. The key feature of HUNTER is a hybrid architecture, which uses samples generated by Genetic Algorithm to warm-start the finer grained exploration of deep reinforcement learning. Meanwhile, we employ Principal Component Analysis, Random Forest, and Fast Exploration Strategy to reduce the search space and the update time of the learning model. In addition, we further propose a clone and parallelization scheme to stress-test workloads on multiple cloned CDB instances (CDBs), resulting in faster and safer configuration exploration. Extensive trials on CDB with public and real-world workloads demonstrate that, given the same time budget and resources, HUNTER improves performance and considerably decreases recommendation time compared to state-of-the-art tuning systems, with accelerations of up to 2.8× and 22.8× utilizing 1 and 20 cloned CDBs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，利用机器学习进行云数据库（CDB）服务的性能调优已经显示出巨大的潜力。然而，面对个性化要求，例如针对不同工作负载进行调整的各种限制，预训练模型可能会在给定新工作负载的情况下不匹配或推荐次优配置。另一方面，如果系统以在线方式调优配置，系统会遇到冷启动问题，导致调优时间长、性能波动大。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 HUNTER 的在线 CDB 调优系统。 HUNTER 的关键特征是混合架构，它使用遗传算法生成的样本来热启动深度强化学习的更细粒度的探索。同时，我们采用主成分分析、随机森林和快速探索策略来减少学习模型的搜索空间和更新时间。此外，我们还提出了一种克隆和并行化方案，可以对多个克隆 CDB 实例（CDB）上的工作负载进行压力测试，从而实现更快、更安全的配置探索。在公共和实际工作负载上对 CDB 进行的广泛试验表明，与最先进的调优系统相比，在给定相同的时间预算和资源的情况下，HUNTER 提高了性能并显着缩短了推荐时间，利用 1 个和 20 个克隆 CDB 的加速分别高达 2.8 倍和 22.8 倍。

papers.title: Hunting Temporal Bumps in Graphs with Dynamic Vertex Properties.
papers.abstract: Given a time interval and a graph where vertices exhibit a property of interest (PoI) dynamically, an interesting question is: where (i.e., which part of the graph) and when (i.e., which time sub-interval) does the PoI occur frequently? To our knowledge, no work has been done to answer this question to date. We address this issue in this paper. Specifically, given (i) a time interval composed of multiple time slots and (ii) a graph where each vertex either exhibits or does not exhibit the PoI in each time slot, our objective is to find a pair of a connected sub-graph and a time sub-interval (which we refer to as a temporal bump), such that the discrepancy between the numbers of times that vertices in this sub-graph exhibit and do not exhibit the PoI during this time sub-interval is maximized. Due to the NP-hardness of this problem, initially, we propose two approximation algorithms. The first one achieves a tight approximation guarantee, at the cost of a weak scalability to the number of time slots. The second one achieves a strong scalability to the number of time slots, at the price of a loose approximation guarantee. Then, we propose two heuristic algorithms that have no non-trivial approximation guarantee, but produce similar solutions with, and are considerably faster than, the two approximation algorithms. Experiments on real datasets show that, in comparison with baselines built using related existing techniques, our algorithms hunt bumps with significantly higher discrepancies, while scaling well to large graphs, and thus are more suitable for answering the aforementioned question.
papers.abstract_zh: 给定一个时间间隔和一个图，其中顶点动态地表现出兴趣属性（PoI），一个有趣的问题是：PoI 在哪里（即图的哪一部分）和何时（即哪个时间子区间）频繁出现？据我们所知，迄今为止还没有任何工作来回答这个问题。我们在本文中讨论了这个问题。具体来说，给定（i）由多个时隙组成的时间间隔和（ii）每个顶点在每个时隙中表现出或不表现出PoI的图，我们的目标是找到一对连通的子图和时间子间隔（我们称为时间凹凸），使得该子图中的顶点在该时间子间隔内表现出和不表现出PoI的次数之间的差异最大化。由于该问题的 NP 难度，最初，我们提出了两种近似算法。第一个实现了严格的近似保证，但代价是时隙数量的可扩展性较弱。第二个实现了时隙数量的强大可扩展性，但代价是松散的近似保证。然后，我们提出了两种启发式算法，它们没有非平凡的近似保证，但产生与这两种近似算法类似的解决方案，并且比这两种近似算法快得多。在真实数据集上的实验表明，与使用相关现有技术构建的基线相比，我们的算法可以捕获具有显着更高差异的凹凸，同时可以很好地扩展到大图，因此更适合回答上述问题。

papers.title: Hybrid Deterministic and Nondeterministic Execution of Transactions in Actor Systems.
papers.abstract: The actor model has been widely adopted in building stateful middle-tiers for large-scale interactive applications, where ACID transactions are useful to ensure application correctness. In this paper, we present Snapper, a new transaction library on top of Orleans, a popular actor system. Snapper exploits the characteristics of actor-oriented programming to improve the performance of multi-actor transactions by employing deterministic transaction execution, where pre-declared actor access information is used to generate deterministic execution schedules. The deterministic execution can potentially improve transaction throughput significantly, especially with a high contention level. Besides, Snapper can also execute actor transactions using conventional nondeterministic strategies, including S2PL, to account for scenarios where actor access information cannot be pre-declared. A salient feature of Snapper is the ability to execute concurrent hybrid workloads, where some transactions are executed deterministically while the others are executed nondeterministically. This novel hybrid execution is able to take advantage of the deterministic execution while being able to account for nondeterministic workloads. Our experimental results on two benchmarks show that deterministic execution can achieve up to 2x higher throughput than nondeterministic execution under a skewed workload. Additionally, the hybrid execution strategy can achieve a throughput that is close to deterministic execution when there is only a small percentage of nondeterministic transactions running in the system.
papers.abstract_zh: 参与者模型已被广泛应用于为大规模交互式应用程序构建有状态中间层，其中 ACID 事务对于确保应用程序的正确性非常有用。在本文中，我们介绍了 Snapper，这是一个基于 Orleans（流行的 Actor 系统）之上的新事务库。 Snapper 利用面向参与者编程的特点，通过采用确定性事务执行来提高多参与者事务的性能，其中预先声明的参与者访问信息用于生成确定性执行计划。确定性执行可以显着提高事务吞吐量，尤其是在竞争级别较高的情况下。此外，Snapper还可以使用传统的非确定性策略（包括S2PL）执行参与者事务，以解决参与者访问信息无法预先声明的场景。 Snapper 的一个显着特征是能够执行并发混合工作负载，其中某些事务是确定性执行的，而其他事务是非确定性执行的。这种新颖的混合执行能够利用确定性执行，同时能够解决不确定性工作负载。我们在两个基准测试上的实验结果表明，在倾斜的工作负载下，确定性执行可以实现比非确定性执行高出 2 倍的吞吐量。此外，当系统中只有一小部分非确定性事务运行时，混合执行策略可以实现接近确定性执行的吞吐量。

papers.title: HypeR: Hypothetical Reasoning With What-If and How-To Queries Using a Probabilistic Causal Approach.
papers.abstract: What-if (provisioning for an update to a database) and how-to (how to modify the database to achieve a goal) analyses provide insights to users who wish to examine hypothetical scenarios without making actual changes to a database and thereby help plan strategies in their fields. Typically, such analyses are done by testing the effect of an update in the existing database on a specific view created by a query of interest. In real-world scenarios, however, an update to a particular part of the database may affect tuples and attributes in a completely different part due to implicit semantic dependencies. To allow for hypothetical reasoning while accommodating such dependencies, we develop HypeR, a framework that supports what-if and how-to queries accounting for probabilistic dependencies among attributes captured by a probabilistic causal model. We extend the SQL syntax to include the necessary operators for expressing these hypothetical queries, define their semantics, devise efficient algorithms and optimizations to compute their results using concepts from causality and probabilistic databases, and evaluate the effectiveness of our approach experimentally.
papers.abstract_zh: 假设（提供数据库更新）和操作方法（如何修改数据库以实现目标）分析为希望检查假设场景而不对数据库进行实际更改的用户提供了见解，从而帮助规划其领域的策略。通常，此类分析是通过测试现有数据库中的更新对感兴趣的查询创建的特定视图的影响来完成的。然而，在现实场景中，由于隐式语义依赖性，对数据库特定部分的更新可能会影响完全不同部分中的元组和属性。为了在适应这种依赖关系的同时允许假设推理，我们开发了 HypeR，这是一个支持假设和操作方法查询的框架，用于解释概率因果模型捕获的属性之间的概率依赖关系。我们扩展 SQL 语法以包含表达这些假设查询所需的运算符，定义其语义，设计有效的算法和优化以使用因果关系和概率数据库的概念计算其结果，并通过实验评估我们方法的有效性。

papers.title: HYPERSONIC: A Hybrid Parallelization Approach for Scalable Complex Event Processing.
papers.abstract: The ability to promptly and efficiently detect arbitrarily complex patterns in massive real-time data streams is a crucial requirement in many modern applications. The ever-growing scale of these applications and the sophistication of the patterns involved make it imperative to employ advanced solutions that can optimize pattern detection. One of the most prominent and well-established ways to achieve the above goal is to apply complex event processing (CEP) in a parallel manner, using a multi-core machine and/or a distributed environment. However, the inherent tightly coupled nature of CEP severely limits the scalability of the parallelization methods currently available. In this paper, we introduce a novel parallelization mechanism for efficient complex event processing over data streams. This mechanism is based on a hybrid two-tier model combining multiple layers of parallelism. By employing a fine-grained load balancing model, this multi-layered approach leads to a substantial increase in event detection throughput, while at the same time reducing the latency and the memory consumption. An extensive experimental evaluation on multiple real-life datasets shows that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art CEP parallelization methods by a factor of two to three orders of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速有效地检测大量实时数据流中任意复杂模式的能力是许多现代应用程序的关键要求。这些应用程序的规模不断扩大，所涉及的模式也越来越复杂，因此必须采用能够优化模式检测的先进解决方案。实现上述目标的最突出和最完善的方法之一是使用多核机器和/或分布式环境以并行方式应用复杂事件处理（CEP）。然而，CEP 固有的紧密耦合性质严重限制了当前可用的并行化方法的可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的并行机制，用于对数据流进行高效的复杂事件处理。该机制基于结合多层并行性的混合两层模型。通过采用细粒度的负载平衡模型，这种多层方法可以显着提高事件检测吞吐量，同时减少延迟和内存消耗。对多个现实数据集的广泛实验评估表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的 CEP 并行化方法两到三个数量级。

papers.title: In-Database Machine Learning with CorgiPile: Stochastic Gradient Descent without Full Data Shuffle.
papers.abstract:
Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is the cornerstone of modern ML systems. Despite its computational efficiency, SGD requires random data access that is inherently inefficient when implemented in systems that rely on block-addressable secondary storage such as HDD and SSD, e.g., in-DB ML systems and TensorFlow/PyTorch over large files. To address this impedance mismatch, various data shuffling strategies have been proposed to balance the convergence rate of SGD (which favors randomness) and its I/O performance (which favors sequential access).

In this paper, we first conduct a systematic empirical study on existing data shuffling strategies, which reveals that all existing strategies have room for improvement---they suffer in terms of I/O performance or convergence rate. With this in mind, we propose a simple but novel hierarchical data shuffling strategy, CorgiPile. Compared with existing strategies, CorgiPile avoids a full data shuffle while maintaining comparable convergence rate of SGD as if a full shuffle were performed. We provide a non-trivial theoretical analysis of CorgiPile on its convergence behavior. We further integrate CorgiPile into PostgreSQL by introducing three new physical operators with optimizations. Our experimental results show that CorgiPile can achieve comparable convergence rate to the full shuffle based SGD, and 1.6X-12.8X faster than two state-of-the-art in-DB ML systems, Apache MADlib and Bismarck, on both HDD and SSD.
papers.abstract_zh:
随机梯度下降（SGD）是现代机器学习系统的基石。尽管计算效率很高，但 SGD 需要随机数据访问，当在依赖于 HDD 和 SSD 等可块寻址辅助存储的系统（例如数据库内 ML 系统和大文件上的 TensorFlow/PyTorch）中实现时，这种访问本质上是低效的。为了解决这种阻抗不匹配的问题，人们提出了各种数据改组策略来平衡 SGD 的收敛速度（有利于随机性）及其 I/O 性能（有利于顺序访问）。

在本文中，我们首先对现有的数据洗牌策略进行了系统的实证研究，结果表明所有现有的策略都有改进的空间——它们在 I/O 性能或收敛速度方面受到影响。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一种简单但新颖的分层数据洗牌策略，CorgiPile。与现有策略相比，CorgiPile 避免了完全数据洗牌，同时保持了与执行完全洗牌相当的 SGD 收敛速度。我们对 CorgiPile 的收敛行为进行了重要的理论分析。我们通过引入三个经过优化的新物理运算符，进一步将 CorgiPile 集成到 PostgreSQL 中。我们的实验结果表明，CorgiPile 可以实现与基于完全洗牌的 SGD 相当的收敛速度，并且在 HDD 和 SSD 上比两个最先进的数据库内机器学习系统 Apache MADlib 和 Bismarck 快 1.6 倍至 12.8 倍。

papers.title: IncShrink: Architecting Efficient Outsourced Databases using Incremental MPC and Differential Privacy.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we consider secure outsourced growing databases (SOGDB) that support view-based query answering. These databases allow untrusted servers to privately maintain a materialized view. This allows servers to use only the materialized view for query processing instead of accessing the original data from which the view was derived. To tackle this, we devise a novel view-based SOGDB framework, Incshrink. The key features of this solution are: (i) Incshrink maintains the view using incremental MPC operators which eliminates the need for a trusted third party upfront, and (ii) to ensure high performance, Incshrink guarantees that the leakage satisfies DP in the presence of updates. To the best of our knowledge, there are no existing systems that have these properties. We demonstrate Incshrink's practical feasibility in terms of efficiency and accuracy with extensive experiments on real-world datasets and the TPC-ds benchmark. The evaluation results show that Incshrink provides a 3-way trade-off in terms of privacy, accuracy and efficiency, and offers at least a 7,800x performance advantage over standard SOGDB that do not support view-based query paradigm.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑支持基于视图的查询应答的安全外包增长数据库（SOGDB）。这些数据库允许不受信任的服务器私下维护物化视图。这允许服务器仅使用物化视图进行查询处理，而不是访问派生视图的原始数据。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种新颖的基于视图的 SOGDB 框架 Incshrink。该解决方案的主要特点是：(i) Incshrink 使用增量 MPC 运算符维护视图，从而无需预先使用受信任的第三方；(ii) 为了确保高性能，Incshrink 保证在存在更新的情况下泄漏满足 DP。据我们所知，现有的系统不具备这些特性。我们通过对真实数据集和 TPC-ds 基准进行大量实验，证明了 Incshrink 在效率和准确性方面的实际可行性。评估结果表明，Incshrink 在隐私、准确性和效率方面提供了 3 种权衡，并且比不支持基于视图的查询范例的标准 SOGDB 提供了至少 7,800 倍的性能优势。

papers.title: Intelligent Automated Workload Analysis for Database Replatforming.
papers.abstract:
Performing a detailed workload analysis is a crucial step in determining the feasibility, timeline and cost of a major data warehouse replatforming project, i.e., migration from one platform to another. A large company's data warehouse applications may include millions of queries, some of which will use features that are unsupported or have different semantics in the new warehouse, or may have poor performance there.

In this paper we present qInsight, a workload analyzer that Datometry has used in data warehouse replatforming efforts for dozens of major clients. qInsight leverages Datometry's Hyper-Q to obtain insights from a workload, including SQL features and workload structural information that could not be obtained without deep query analysis. qInsight uses the identified features and a weighting scheme based on human expert judgments to assess the difficulty of rewriting each application in the workload via traditional migration methods. Datometry's clients find this information useful in planning their projects, including the order in which to migrate applications. We present a qInsight-based data warehouse usage analysis of over 1.7 billion queries from real-world workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
执行详细的工作负载分析是确定主要数据仓库平台重组项目（即从一个平台迁移到另一个平台）的可行性、时间表和成本的关键步骤。大型公司的数据仓库应用程序可能包含数百万个查询，其中一些查询将使用新仓库中不受支持或具有不同语义的功能，或者可能在新仓库中性能较差。

在本文中，我们介绍了 qInsight，这是 Datometry 已在数十家主要客户的数据仓库平台重建工作中使用的工作负载分析器。 qInsight 利用 Datometry 的 Hyper-Q 从工作负载中获取洞察，包括 SQL 功能和工作负载结构信息，这些信息需要深入的查询分析才能获得。 qInsight 使用已识别的特征和基于人类专家判断的加权方案来评估通过传统迁移方法重写工作负载中每个应用程序的难度。 Datometry 的客户发现这些信息对于规划他们的项目非常有用，包括迁移应用程序的顺序。我们对来自实际工作负载的超过 17 亿个查询进行了基于 qInsight 的数据仓库使用情况分析。

papers.title: Interactive Query Explanations Using Fine Grained Provenance.
papers.abstract: Database users, enabled by business intelligence and data visualization platforms, use relational queries to better understand their data. When surprising aggregation results or unexpected rows appear, they want to know which input table rows caused them. While state-of-the-art query explanation systems advocate for re-running queries under counterfactual interventions on the input tables, running many of them interactively remains challenging. Prior work relies on incremental view maintenance (IVM) to refresh query results, incurring significant materialization overhead for query intermediates and scaling poorly when interventions result in many insertions/deletions. Inspired by recent advances in fast fine grained lineage capture we propose a compilation engine that leverages lineage metadata to interactively evaluate counterfactual interventions. By forgoing the conventional approach of representing lineage metadata as symbolic expressions and executing them, we decrease latencies by multiple orders of magnitude against IVM and lineage based approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据库用户在商业智能和数据可视化平台的支持下，使用关系查询来更好地理解他们的数据。当出现令人惊讶的聚合结果或意外的行时，他们想知道哪些输入表行导致了它们。虽然最先进的查询解释系统主张在输入表的反事实干预下重新运行查询，但以交互方式运行其中许多查询仍然具有挑战性。之前的工作依赖增量视图维护 (IVM) 来刷新查询结果，这会导致查询中间体产生大量物化开销，并且当干预导致大量插入/删除时，扩展性很差。受到快速细粒度谱系捕获最新进展的启发，我们提出了一个编译引擎，它利用谱系元数据以交互方式评估反事实干预。通过放弃将谱系元数据表示为符号表达式并执行它们的传统方法，与基于 IVM 和谱系的方法相比，我们将延迟减少了多个数量级。

papers.title: International Workshop on Data Management on New Hardware (DaMoN).
papers.abstract: New hardware, like multi-core CPUs, GPUs, FPGAs, new memory and storage technologies, and low-power hardware impose a great challenge to optimizing database performance. Consequently, exploiting the characteristics of modern hardware has become an important topic of database systems research. In the past decade the DaMoN workshop has established itself as the primary database venue to present ideas how to exploit new hardware for data management, in particular how to improve performance or scalability of databases, how new hardware unlocks new database application scenarios, and how data management could benefit from future hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 新的硬件，如多核CPU、GPU、FPGA、新的内存和存储技术以及低功耗硬件给优化数据库性能带来了巨大的挑战。因此，利用现代硬件的特性已成为数据库系统研究的一个重要课题。在过去的十年中，DaMoN 研讨会已成为主要的数据库场所，展示如何利用新硬件进行数据管理，特别是如何提高数据库的性能或可扩展性、新硬件如何解锁新的数据库应用场景以及数据管理如何从未来的硬件中受益。

papers.title: Interpretable Data-Based Explanations for Fairness Debugging.
papers.abstract: A wide variety of fairness metrics and eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches have been proposed in the literature to identify bias in machine learning models that are used in critical real-life contexts. However, merely reporting on a model's bias or generating explanations using existing XAI techniques is insufficient to locate and eventually mitigate sources of bias. We introduce Gopher, a system that produces compact, interpretable, and causal explanations for bias or unexpected model behavior by identifying coherent subsets of the training data that are root-causes for this behavior. Specifically, we introduce the concept of causal responsibility that quantifies the extent to which intervening on training data by removing or updating subsets of it can resolve the bias. Building on this concept, we develop an efficient approach for generating the top-k patterns that explain model bias by utilizing techniques from the machine learning (ML) community to approximate causal responsibility, and using pruning rules to manage the large search space for patterns. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of Gopher in generating interpretable explanations for identifying and debugging sources of bias.
papers.abstract_zh: 文献中提出了各种各样的公平性指标和可解释的人工智能（XAI）方法来识别关键现实生活环境中使用的机器学习模型中的偏差。然而，仅仅报告模型的偏差或使用现有的 XAI 技术生成解释不足以定位并最终减轻偏差来源。我们引入了 Gopher，这是一个系统，通过识别训练数据的连贯子集（这些行为的根本原因），为偏差或意外模型行为提供紧凑、可解释和因果的解释。具体来说，我们引入了因果责任的概念，该概念量化了通过删除或更新训练数据子集来干预训练数据可以解决偏差的程度。基于这个概念，我们开发了一种有效的方法来生成 top-k 模式，通过利用机器学习 (ML) 社区的技术来近似因果责任，并使用修剪规则来管理模式的大型搜索空间，从而解释模型偏差。我们的实验评估证明了 Gopher 在生成可解释的解释以识别和调试偏差来源方面的有效性。

papers.title: Is Data Management the Beating Heart of AI Systems?
papers.abstract:
The era of artificially intelligent systems is here, and the breadth and speed of the change has been breathtaking. Less than a decade ago, Google did not use AI or machine learning in its products. Today, we interact with a wide range of AI-powered systems when we search the web, write an email, watch a video, or make a purchase. AI has spread beyond the web as well, we use it every time we touch phones, open our laptops, turn on our television, enter (or request) a car, and many more interactions. What's perhaps more remarkable than the ubiquity of these systems is how they operate: they optimize a small number of machine learning architectures on increasingly vast and diverse quantities of data. As a result, data management is at the heart of this new breed of systems.

This talk explores the idea that the next phase of AI systems might have historic parallels with the growth of relational data management. In this talk, I survey some of the exciting recent developments that have affected my own work in industry and research building systems to support AI applications. My main message is that it is an incredibly exciting time for researchers and industrial practitioners from the data management community to bring their expertise to the next generation of AI systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
人工智能系统的时代已经到来，变革的广度和速度令人惊叹。不到十年前，谷歌并未在其产品中使用人工智能或机器学习。如今，当我们搜索网络、写电子邮件、观看视频或购物时，我们会与各种人工智能驱动的系统进行交互。人工智能也已经扩展到网络之外，每次我们触摸手机、打开笔记本电脑、打开电视、进入（或请求）汽车以及更多交互时，我们都会用到它。也许比这些系统的普遍性更引人注目的是它们的运行方式：它们在数量日益庞大和多样化的数据上优化少量机器学习架构。因此，数据管理是这种新型系统的核心。

本演讲探讨了人工智能系统的下一阶段可能与关系数据管理的发展具有历史相似之处的想法。在本次演讲中，我调查了一些令人兴奋的最新发展，这些发展影响了我自己在工业和研究构建支持人工智能应用的系统方面的工作。我的主要信息是，对于数据管理社区的研究人员和行业从业者来说，将他们的专业知识带入下一代人工智能系统是一个令人难以置信的激动人心的时刻。

papers.title: ISUM: Efficiently Compressing Large and Complex Workloads for Scalable Index Tuning.
papers.abstract: Today's database systems include index advisors that recommend an appropriate set of indexes for an input workload. Since index tuning on large and complex workloads can be resource-intensive and time-consuming, workload compression techniques have been proposed to improve the scalability of index tuning. Workload compression techniques aim to efficiently identify a small subset of queries in the workload to tune such that the indexes recommended when tuning the compressed workload give similar performance improvements as when tuning the input workload. In this paper, we propose ISUM, a new workload compression algorithm that is based on two key ideas: a low-overhead technique for estimating the improvement in performance of the input workload when a subset of queries is selected for index tuning, and a novel method for concisely representing information across queries in the workload that improves scalability by avoiding pairwise comparisons between queries when choosing the set of queries to tune. Our evaluation over industry benchmarks and real-world customer workloads shows that ISUM results in a 1.4x of median and 2x of maximum performance improvements for the input workload when compared to prior techniques over similar compressed workload sizes.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今的数据库系统包括索引顾问，可为输入工作负载推荐一组适当的索引。由于对大型且复杂的工作负载进行索引调整可能是资源密集型且耗时的，因此提出了工作负载压缩技术来提高索引调整的可扩展性。工作负载压缩技术旨在有效地识别要调整的工作负载中的一小部分查询，以便调整压缩工作负载时推荐的索引可以提供与调整输入工作负载时类似的性能改进。在本文中，我们提出了 ISUM，一种新的工作负载压缩算法，它基于两个关键思想：一种低开销技术，用于在选择查询子集进行索引调整时估计输入工作负载性能的改进；以及一种新颖的方法，用于在工作负载中简洁地表示跨查询的信息，该方法通过在选择要调整的查询集时避免查询之间的成对比较来提高可扩展性。我们对行业基准和实际客户工作负载的评估表明，与类似压缩工作负载大小的现有技术相比，ISUM 使输入工作负载的中值性能提高了 1.4 倍，最大性能提高了 2 倍。

papers.title: JEDI: These aren't the JSON documents you're looking for?
papers.abstract: The JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) is a popular data format used in document stores to natively support semi-structured data. In this paper, we address the problem of JSON similarity lookup queries: given a query document and a distance threshold τ, retrieve all documents that are within τ from the query document. Different from other hierarchical formats such as XML, JSON supports both ordered and unordered sibling collections within a single document which poses a new challenge to the tree model and distance computation. We propose JSON tree, a lossless tree representation of JSON documents, and define the JSON Edit Distance (JEDI), the first edit-based distance measure for JSON. We develop QuickJEDI, an algorithm that computes JEDI by leveraging a new technique to prune expensive sibling matchings. It outperforms a baseline algorithm by an order of magnitude in runtime. To boost the performance of JSON similarity queries, we introduce an index called JSIM and an effective upper bound based on tree sorting. Our upper bound algorithm runs in O(nτ) time and O(n+τ log n) space, which substantially improves the previous best bound of O(n2) time and O(n log n) space (where n is the tree size). Our experimental evaluation shows that our solution scales to databases with millions of documents and JSON trees with tens of thousands of nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: JavaScript 对象表示法 (JSON) 是文档存储中使用的一种流行数据格式，本身支持半结构化数据。在本文中，我们解决了 JSON 相似性查找查询的问题：给定查询文档和距离阈值 τ，从查询文档中检索 τ 内的所有文档。与 XML 等其他分层格式不同，JSON 在单个文档中同时支持有序和无序同级集合，这对树模型和距离计算提出了新的挑战。我们提出了 JSON 树（JSON 文档的无损树表示），并定义了 JSON 编辑距离（JEDI），这是第一个基于编辑的 JSON 距离度量。我们开发了 QuickJEDI，这是一种通过利用新技术来修剪昂贵的同级匹配来计算 JEDI 的算法。它在运行时的性能比基线算法高出一个数量级。为了提高 JSON 相似性查询的性能，我们引入了名为 JSIM 的索引和基于树排序的有效上限。我们的上限算法在 O(nτ) 时间和 O(n+τ log n) 空间中运行，这大大改进了之前 O(n2) 时间和 O(n log n) 空间（其中 n 是树大小）的最佳边界。我们的实验评估表明，我们的解决方案可扩展到包含数百万文档的数据库和包含数万个节点的 JSON 树。

papers.title: Juggler: Autonomous Cost Optimization and Performance Prediction of Big Data Applications.
papers.abstract:
Distributed in-memory processing frameworks accelerate iterative workloads by caching suitable datasets in memory rather than recomputing them in each iteration. Selecting appropriate datasets to cache as well as allocating a suitable cluster configuration for caching these datasets play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. In practice, both are tedious, time-consuming tasks and are often neglected by end users, who are typically not aware of workload semantics, sizes of intermediate data, and cluster specification.

To address these problems, we present Juggler, an end-to-end framework, which autonomously selects appropriate datasets for caching and recommends a correspondingly suitable cluster configuration to end users, with the aim of achieving optimal execution time and cost. We evaluate Juggler on various iterative, real-world, machine learning applications. Compared with our baseline, Juggler reduces execution time to 25.1% and cost to 58.1%, on average, as a result of selecting suitable datasets for caching. It recommends optimal cluster configuration in 50% of cases and near-to-optimal configuration in the remaining cases. Moreover, Juggler achieves an average performance prediction accuracy of 90%.
papers.abstract_zh:
分布式内存处理框架通过在内存中缓存合适的数据集而不是在每次迭代中重新计算它们来加速迭代工作负载。选择合适的数据集进行缓存以及分配合适的集群配置来缓存这些数据集对于实现最佳性能至关重要。在实践中，这两者都是乏味且耗时的任务，并且经常被最终用户忽视，他们通常不了解工作负载语义、中间数据的大小和集群规范。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Juggler，一个端到端的框架，它可以自主选择合适的数据集进行缓存，并向最终用户推荐相应合适的集群配置，目的是实现最佳的执行时间和成本。我们在各种迭代的、现实世界的机器学习应用程序上评估 Juggler。与我们的基准相比，由于选择了合适的数据集进行缓存，Juggler 平均将执行时间减少到 25.1%，成本减少到 58.1%。它在 50% 的情况下建议最佳集群配置，在其余情况下建议接近最佳配置。此外，Juggler 的平均性能预测准确率达到 90%。

papers.title: KafkaDirect: Zero-copy Data Access for Apache Kafka over RDMA Networks.
papers.abstract: Apache Kafka is an open-source distributed publish-subscribe system, which is widely used in data centers for messaging between applications, log aggregation, and stream processing. The existing Kafka implementation uses TCP/IP for communication, which has various inefficiencies such as a high message dispatch cost due to OS involvement and excessive memory copies. Recently, the availability of cost-effective RDMA-capable network controllers within data centers and cloud infrastructures have encouraged many modern applications to adopt RDMA networking, which offers the potential to outperform classical TCP/IP. We introduce KafkaDirect, an extension to Apache Kafka, that uses RDMA to accelerate the three most network intensive datapaths: record production, record replication, and record consumption. In this work, we explore the design choices including which RDMA operations to use to take full advantage of offloaded communication. Our RDMA design relies on one-sided RDMA requests to attain true zero-copy communication completely avoiding the need for using intermediate buffers in Kafka servers, thereby ensuring low latency and high throughput communication. KafkaDirect can offer up to 9x increase in throughput for both Kafka producers and Kafka consumers, and can provide 4x and 50x reduction in latency for Kafka producers and Kafka consumers, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: Apache Kafka 是一个开源分布式发布订阅系统，广泛应用于数据中心，用于应用程序之间的消息传递、日志聚合和流处理。现有的Kafka实现使用TCP/IP进行通信，存在各种低效率的问题，例如由于操作系统的参与而导致消息分发成本较高、内存副本过多等。最近，数据中心和云基础设施中经济高效的支持 RDMA 的网络控制器的出现，鼓励许多现代应用程序采用 RDMA 网络，这提供了超越传统 TCP/IP 的潜力。我们引入 KafkaDirect，它是 Apache Kafka 的扩展，它使用 RDMA 来加速三个网络最密集的数据路径：记录生产、记录复制和记录消费。在这项工作中，我们探索了设计选择，包括使用哪些 RDMA 操作来充分利用卸载通信。我们的 RDMA 设计依靠单侧 RDMA 请求来实现真正的零拷贝通信，完全避免了在 Kafka 服务器中使用中间缓冲区的需要，从而确保低延迟和高吞吐量通信。 KafkaDirect 可以为 Kafka 生产者和 Kafka 消费者提供高达 9 倍的吞吐量增长，并可以分别为 Kafka 生产者和 Kafka 消费者提供 4 倍和 50 倍的延迟减少。

papers.title: LANTERN: Boredom-conscious Natural Language Description Generation of Query Execution Plans for Database Education.
papers.abstract: The database systems course in an undergraduate computer science degree program is gaining increasing importance due to the continuous supply of database-related jobs as well as the rise of Data Science. A key learning goal of learners taking such a course is to understand how SQL queries are executed in an RDBMS in practice. An RDBMS typically exposes a query execution plan (QEP) in a visual or textual format, which describes the execution steps for a given query. However, it is often daunting for a learner to comprehend these QEPs containing vendor-specific implementation details. In this demonstration, we present a novel, generic, and portable system called LANTERN that generates a natural language (NL)-based description of the execution strategy chosen by the underlying RDBMS to process a query. It provides a declarative framework called POOL for subject matter experts (SME) to efficiently create and manipulate the NL descriptions of physical operators of any RDBMS. It then exploits POOL to generate the NL descriptions of QEPs by integrating a rule-based and a deep learning-based techniques to infuse language variability in the descriptions. Such an NL generation strategy mitigates the impact of boredom on learners caused by repeated exposure of similar text generated by a rule-based system.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于数据库相关工作的持续提供以及数据科学的兴起，计算机科学本科学位课程中的数据库系统课程变得越来越重要。参加此类课程的学习者的一个关键学习目标是了解 SQL 查询在实践中如何在 RDBMS 中执行。 RDBMS 通常以可视或文本格式公开查询执行计划 (QEP)，它描述给定查询的执行步骤。然而，对于学习者来说，理解这些包含特定于供应商的实现细节的 QEP 通常是令人畏惧的。在本次演示中，我们展示了一种新颖、通用且可移植的系统，称为 LANTERN，它生成基于自然语言 (NL) 的描述，描述底层 RDBMS 选择的执行策略来处理查询。它为主题专家 (SME) 提供了一个名为 POOL 的声明性框架，以有效地创建和操作任何 RDBMS 的物理运算符的 NL 描述。然后，它通过集成基于规则和基于深度学习的技术，利用 POOL 生成 QEP 的 NL 描述，以在描述中注入语言可变性。这种自然语言生成策略减轻了学习者因重复接触基于规则的系统生成的相似文本而感到无聊的影响。

papers.title: LDP-IDS: Local Differential Privacy for Infinite Data Streams.
papers.abstract: Local differential privacy (LDP) is promising for private streaming data collection and analysis. However, existing few LDP studies over streams either apply to finite streams only or may suffer from insufficient protection. This paper investigates this problem by proposing LDP-IDS, a novel w-event LDP paradigm to provide practical privacy guarantee for infinite streams. By constructing a unified error analysis, we adapt the existing budget division framework in centralized differential privacy (CDP) for LDP-IDS, which however incurs prohibitive noise and expensive communication cost. To this end, we propose a novel and extensible framework of population division and recycling, as well as online adaptive population division algorithms for LDP-IDS. We provide theoretical guarantees and demonstrate, through extensive discussions, that our proposed framework not only achieves significant reduction in utility loss and communication overhead, but also enjoys great compatibility for varied analytic tasks and flexibility of incorporating ideas of many existing stream algorithms. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate the high effectiveness, efficiency, and flexibility of our proposed framework and methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 本地差分隐私（LDP）在私有流数据收集和分析方面很有前景。然而，现有的一些关于流的LDP研究要么仅适用于有限流，要么可能受到保护不足的困扰。本文通过提出 LDP-IDS 来研究这个问题，这是一种新颖的 w 事件 LDP 范式，为无限流提供实用的隐私保证。通过构建统一的错误分析，我们将集中式差分隐私（CDP）中现有的预算划分框架应用于LDP-IDS，但这会产生令人望而却步的噪音和昂贵的通信成本。为此，我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的种群划分和回收框架，以及LDP-IDS的在线自适应种群划分算法。我们提供了理论保证，并通过广泛的讨论证明，我们提出的框架不仅可以显着减少效用损失和通信开销，而且还具有对各种分析任务的良好兼容性以及结合许多现有流算法思想的灵活性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验验证了我们提出的框架和方法的高效性、高效性和灵活性。

papers.title: Learned Cardinality Estimation: An In-depth Study.
papers.abstract:
Learned cardinality estimation (CE) has recently gained significant attention for replacing long-studied traditional CE with machine learning, especially for deep learning. However, these estimators were developed independently and have not been fairly or comprehensively compared in common settings. Most studies use a subset of IMDB data which is too simple to measure their limits and determine whether they are ready for real, complex data. Furthermore, they are regarded as black boxes, without a deep understanding of why large errors occur.

In this paper, we first provide a taxonomy and a unified workflow of learned estimators for a better understanding of estimators. We next comprehensively compare recent learned CE methods that support joins, from a subset of tables to full IMDB and TPC-DS datasets. Under the experimental results, we then demystify the black-box models and analyze critical components that cause large errors. We also measure their impact on query optimization. Finally, based on the findings, we suggest realizable research opportunities. We believe that a deeper understanding of the behavior of existing methods can provide a more comprehensive and substantial framework for developing better estimators.
papers.abstract_zh:
学习基数估计（CE）最近因用机器学习（尤其是深度学习）取代长期研究的传统 CE 而受到广泛关注。然而，这些估计器是独立开发的，尚未在常见环境中进行公平或全面的比较。大多数研究使用 IMDB 数据的子集，这些数据太简单，无法衡量其局限性并确定它们是否准备好处理真实、复杂的数据。此外，它们被视为黑匣子，没有深入了解为什么会出现大错误。

在本文中，我们首先提供学习估计器的分类和统一工作流程，以便更好地理解估计器。接下来，我们全面比较最近学习的支持连接的 CE 方法，从表的子集到完整的 IMDB 和 TPC-DS 数据集。根据实验结果，我们揭开了黑盒模型的神秘面纱，并分析了导致较大误差的关键组件。我们还衡量它们对查询优化的影响。最后，根据研究结果，我们建议可实现的研究机会。我们相信，对现有方法的行为进行更深入的了解可以为开发更好的估计器提供更全面和更实质性的框架。

papers.title: LearnedSQLGen: Constraint-aware SQL Generation using Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Many database optimization problems, e.g., slow SQL diagnosis, database testing, optimizer tuning, require a large volume of SQL queries. Due to privacy issues, it is hard to obtain real SQL queries, and thus SQL generation is a very important task in database optimization. Existing SQL generation methods either randomly generate SQL queries or rely on human-crafted SQL templates to generate SQL queries, but they cannot meet various user specific requirements, e.g., slow SQL queries, SQL queries with large result sizes. To address this problem, this paper studies the problem of constraint-aware SQL generation, which, given a constraint (e.g., cardinality within [1k,2k]), generates SQL queries satisfying the constraint. This problem is rather challenging, because it is rather hard to capture the relationship from query constraint (e.g., cardinality and cost) to SQL queries and thus it is hard to guide a generation method to explore the SQL generation direction towards meeting the constraint. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) based framework LearnedSQLGen, for generating queries satisfying the constraint. LearnedSQLGen adopts an exploration-exploitation strategy that exploits the generation direction following the query constraint, which is learned from query execution feedback. We judiciously design the reward function in RL to guide the generation process accurately. We integrate a finite-state machine to generate valid SQL queries. Experimental results on three benchmarks showed that LearnedSQLGen significantly outperformed the baselines in terms of both accuracy (30% better) and efficiency (10-35 times).
