papers.abstract_zh: 许多数据库优化问题，例如慢速SQL诊断、数据库测试、优化器调优，都需要大量的SQL查询。由于隐私问题，很难获得真实的SQL查询，因此SQL生成是数据库优化中非常重要的任务。现有的SQL生成方法要么随机生成SQL查询，要么依靠人为设计的SQL模板来生成SQL查询，但它们无法满足各种用户特定的需求，例如慢速SQL查询、结果大小较大的SQL查询。为了解决这个问题，本文研究了约束感知 SQL 生成问题，在给定约束（例如，[1k,2k] 内的基数）的情况下，生成满足约束的 SQL 查询。这个问题相当具有挑战性，因为很难捕获查询约束（例如基数和成本）与 SQL 查询的关系，因此很难指导生成方法来探索满足约束的 SQL 生成方向。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架 LearnedSQLGen，用于生成满足约束的查询。 LearnedSQLGen 采用探索-利用策略，利用查询约束后的生成方向，这是从查询执行反馈中学习到的。我们明智地设计了强化学习中的奖励函数，以准确地指导生成过程。我们集成有限状态机来生成有效的 SQL 查询。三个基准测试的实验结果表明，LearnedSQLGen 在准确性（提高 30%）和效率（10-35 倍）方面均显着优于基准。

papers.title: LedgerView: Access-Control Views on Hyperledger Fabric.
papers.abstract: We present LedgerView -- a system that adds access control views to permissioned blockchains. The approach is motivated by an AT&T application of tracking refurbished devices. A blockchain is a decentralized tamper-resistant ledger managed by a group of peers. It is used in many applications for storing and sharing sensitive information, e.g., monetary transactions, health records, personal documents, etc. But in blockchain, all the peers see all the stored transactions, while in some applications, access to sensitive information should be limited, that is, concealed from peers and users who do not have proper access permissions. In database management systems, sets of records that are visible to some users and concealed from others are defined by views, but existing blockchain systems lack such access-control capabilities. Thus, in this paper, we introduce access-control views for Hyperledger Fabric. We present two types of views -- irrevocable and revocable, according to whether access to sensitive information can or cannot be revoked. We explain how to implement the two types of view by using cryptographic hash functions and encryption keys, and we show how to support Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). Experiments with supply chain transactions illustrate the incurred costs of the views in LedgerView, including latency, transaction rate and storage overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 LedgerView——一个向许可区块链添加访问控制视图的系统。该方法的灵感源自 AT&T 跟踪翻新设备的应用程序。区块链是一个由一组同行管理的去中心化的防篡改账本。它在许多应用程序中用于存储和共享敏感信息，例如货币交易、健康记录、个人文档等。但在区块链中，所有节点都可以看到所有存储的交易，而在某些应用程序中，对敏感信息的访问应该受到限制，即对没有适当访问权限的节点和用户隐藏。在数据库管理系统中，某些用户可见而其他用户隐藏的记录集是通过视图定义的，但现有的区块链系统缺乏这种访问控制功能。因此，在本文中，我们介绍了 Hyperledger Fabric 的访问控制视图。根据是否可以撤销对敏感信息的访问权限，我们提出两种类型的观点：不可撤销的和可撤销的。我们解释了如何使用加密哈希函数和加密密钥来实现两种类型的视图，并展示如何支持基于角色的访问控制 (RBAC)。供应链交易实验说明了 LedgerView 中视图所产生的成本，包括延迟、交易率和存储开销。

papers.title: Leva: Boosting Machine Learning Performance with Relational Embedding Data Augmentation.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present Leva, an end-to-end system that boosts the performance of machine learning tasks over relational data. Leva builds a relational embedding by representing relational data as a graph and then using embedding methods to represent the graph as vectors. The embedding represents information from the entire database, including useful information for the downstream machine learning task. At the same time, some information in the graph will be erroneous, for example, corresponding to incorrect inclusion dependencies. However, we show that the supervision signal from the downstream task filters out information that is not useful. The result is a boost in ML performance. This result means that it is possible for analysts to avoid the time-consuming effort of collecting features across multiple relations-which requires solving a data discovery and integration problem-and instead rely on these techniques to train better-performing models. We demonstrate Leva's performance on different classification and regression datasets and compare it with multiple other baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Leva，这是一种端到端系统，可以提高机器学习任务相对于关系数据的性能。 Leva 通过将关系数据表示为图，然后使用嵌入方法将图表示为向量来构建关系嵌入。嵌入表示来自整个数据库的信息，包括对下游机器学习任务有用的信息。同时，图中的一些信息将会是错误的，例如对应于不正确的包含依赖关系。然而，我们表明来自下游任务的监督信号过滤掉了无用的信息。结果是机器学习性能的提升。这一结果意味着分析师可以避免跨多个关系收集特征的耗时工作（这需要解决数据发现和集成问题），而是依赖这些技术来训练性能更好的模型。我们展示了 Leva 在不同分类和回归数据集上的性能，并将其与多个其他基线进行比较。

papers.title: Lightweight and Accurate Cardinality Estimation by Neural Network Gaussian Process.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning (DL) has achieved great success in many real applications. Despite its success, there are some main problems when deploying advanced DL models in database systems, such as hyper-parameters tuning, the risk of overfitting, and lack of prediction uncertainty. In this paper, we study a lightweight and accurate cardinality estimation for SQL queries, which is also uncertainty-aware. By lightweight, we mean that we can train a DL model in a few seconds. With uncertainty ensured,it becomes possible to update the estimator to improve its prediction in areas with high uncertainty.The approach we explore is different from the direction of deploying sophisticated DL models as cardinality estimators in database systems. We employ Bayesian deep learning (BDL), which serves as a bridge between Bayesian inference and deep learning. The prediction distribution by BDL provides principled uncertainty calibration for the prediction. In addition, when the network width of a BDL model goes to infinity, the model performs equivalent to Gaussian Process (GP). This special class of BDL, known as Neural Network Gaussian Process (NNGP), inherits the advantages of Bayesian approach while keeping universal approximation of neural networks, and can utilize a much larger model space to model distribution-free data as a nonparametric model. We show our NNGP estimator achieves high accuracy, is built fast, and is robust to query workload shift, in our extensive performance studies by comparing with existing learned estimators. We also confirm the effectiveness of NNGP by integrating it into PostgreSQL.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）在许多实际应用中取得了巨大成功。尽管取得了成功，但在数据库系统中部署高级深度学习模型时仍存在一些主要问题，例如超参数调整、过度拟合的风险以及缺乏预测不确定性。在本文中，我们研究了一种轻量级且准确的 SQL 查询基数估计，它也是不确定性感知的。所谓轻量级，是指我们可以在几秒钟内训练一个深度学习模型。在确保不确定性的情况下，可以更新估计器以改进其在高不确定性区域的预测。我们探索的方法不同于在数据库系统中部署复杂的深度学习模型作为基数估计器的方向。我们采用贝叶斯深度学习（BDL），它充当贝叶斯推理和深度学习之间的桥梁。 BDL 的预测分布为预测提供了原则上的不确定性校准。此外，当 BDL 模型的网络宽度趋于无穷大时，该模型的性能相当于高斯过程（GP）。这种特殊的BDL，称为神经网络高斯过程（NNGP），继承了贝叶斯方法的优点，同时保持神经网络的通用逼近，并且可以利用更大的模型空间将无分布数据建模为非参数模型。在我们广泛的性能研究中，通过与现有的学习估计器进行比较，我们展示了我们的 NNGP 估计器实现了高精度、构建速度快，并且对于查询工作负载转移具有鲁棒性。我们还通过将 NNGP 集成到 PostgreSQL 中来确认其有效性。

papers.title: Lineage Resource Manager.
papers.abstract: Main memory columnar database systems such as HyPer [1], Hana [4], MemSQL [9] have rapidly grown in use for both OLTP and OLAP applications in enterprise software [5]. Lineage capture in such in-memory columnar database systems incurs memory and performance overhead[2]. Hence we want to control the lineage capture overhead in such systems. We propose a lineage resource manager that employs specific mechanisms to control the lineage capture overhead. For implementing the resource manager, we consider an in-memory columnar query execution engine that supports concurrent query execution, where operators have been instrumented to capture lineage. Controlling lineage capture overhead is more imminent in embedded analytical systems (database systems running alongside another process, not as a standalone process) like DuckDB [11] and MonetDBLite [10].
papers.abstract_zh: HyPer [1]、Hana [4]、MemSQL [9] 等主存列式数据库系统在企业软件 [5] 中的 OLTP 和 OLAP 应用程序中的使用迅速增长。这种内存中列式数据库系统中的沿袭捕获会产生内存和性能开销[2]。因此，我们希望控制此类系统中的沿袭捕获开销。我们提出了一种沿袭资源管理器，它采用特定的机制来控制沿袭捕获开销。为了实现资源管理器，我们考虑使用支持并发查询执行的内存中列式查询执行引擎，其中操作符已被用来捕获沿袭。在 DuckDB [11] 和 MonetDBLite [10] 等嵌入式分析系统（与另一个进程一起运行的数据库系统，而不是作为独立进程）中，控制谱系捕获开销更为紧迫。

papers.title: Litmus: Towards a Practical Database Management System with Verifiable ACID Properties and Transaction Correctness.
papers.abstract:
Existing secure database management systems (DBMSs) focus on security and privacy of data but overlook semantic properties, such as the correctness and ACID properties of transactions. Enforcing these properties is crucial to the functionality of applications. If these guarantees do not hold, catastrophic losses could result.

To address this issue, we present Litmus, a DBMS that can provide verifiable proofs of transaction correctness and semantic properties including atomicity and serializability. Litmus features a co-design of both the database and the cryptographic parts. We evaluate a proof-of-concept prototype of Litmus on the YCSB and TPC-C benchmarks and show that under reasonable cryptographic assumptions it can process more than 15,000 transactions per second (txn/s) verifiably. Our result shows a promising practical direction considering that PayPal runs on average 115 txn/s and VISA 2000-4000 txn/s. The proof is about 30kB per verification batch and verifies with a constant time of 300 seconds. Litmus can extend to verify consistency as well.
papers.abstract_zh:
现有的安全数据库管理系统（DBMS）关注数据的安全性和隐私性，但忽视了语义属性，例如事务的正确性和ACID属性。强制实施这些属性对于应用程序的功能至关重要。如果这些保证不成立，可能会导致灾难性的损失。

为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Litmus，这是一种 DBMS，它可以提供事务正确性和语义属性（包括原子性和可序列化性）的可验证证明。 Litmus 具有数据库和加密部分的协同设计。我们在 YCSB 和 TPC-C 基准上评估了 Litmus 的概念验证原型，并表明在合理的加密假设下，它可以可验证地每秒处理超过 15,000 笔交易 (txn/s)。考虑到 PayPal 的平均运行速度为 115 txn/s，VISA 的平均运行速度为 2000-4000 txn/s，我们的结果显示了一个有希望的实用方向。每个验证批次的证明约为 30kB，并以 300 秒的恒定时间进行验证。 Litmus 还可以扩展以验证一致性。

papers.title: Live Patching Database Management Systems.
LOCAT: Low-Overhead Online Configuration Auto-Tuning of Spark SQL Applications.
papers.abstract:
Spark SQL has been widely deployed in industry but it is challenging to tune its performance. Recent studies try to employ machine learning (ML) to solve this problem, but suffer from two drawbacks. First, it takes a long time (high overhead) to collect training samples. Second, the optimal configuration for one input data size of the same application might not be optimal for others.

To address these issues, we propose a novel Bayesian Optimization (BO) based approach named LOCAT to automatically tune the configurations of Spark SQL applications online. LOCAT innovates three techniques. The first technique, named QCSA, eliminates the configuration-insensitive queries by Query Configuration Sensitivity Analysis (QCSA) when collecting training samples. The second technique, dubbed DAGP, is a Datasize-Aware Gaussian Process (DAGP) which models the performance of an application as a distribution of functions of configuration parameters as well as input data size. The third technique, called IICP, Identifies Important Configuration Parameters (IICP) with respect to performance and only tunes the important ones. As such, LOCAT can tune the configurations of a Spark SQL application with low overhead and adapt to different input data sizes

We employ Spark SQL applications from benchmark suites TPC-DS, TPC-H, and HiBench running on two significantly different clusters, a four-node ARM cluster and an eight-node x86 cluster, to evaluate LOCAT. The experimental results on the ARM cluster show that LOCAT accelerates the optimization procedures of the state-of-the-art approaches by at least 4.1× and up to 9.7×; moreover, LOCAT improves the application performance by at least 1.9× and up to 2.4×. On the x86 cluster, LOCAT shows similar results to those on the ARM cluster.
papers.abstract_zh:
Spark SQL已在工业界得到广泛部署，但其性能调优具有挑战性。最近的研究尝试利用机器学习（ML）来解决这个问题，但存在两个缺点。首先，收集训练样本需要很长时间（开销很高）。其次，同一应用程序的一种输入数据大小的最佳配置可能不适用于其他应用程序。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 LOCAT 的基于贝叶斯优化 (BO) 的新颖方法，用于自动在线调整 Spark SQL 应用程序的配置。 LOCAT创新了三项技术。第一种技术名为 QCSA，它在收集训练样本时通过查询配置敏感性分析 (QCSA) 消除了对配置不敏感的查询。第二种技术称为 DAGP，是数据大小感知高斯过程 (DAGP)，它将应用程序的性能建模为配置参数和输入数据大小的函数分布。第三种技术称为 IICP，可识别与性能相关的重要配置参数 (IICP)，并仅调整重要参数。因此，LOCAT 可以以较低的开销调整 Spark SQL 应用程序的配置，并适应不同的输入数据大小

我们使用基准测试套件 TPC-DS、TPC-H 和 HiBench 中的 Spark SQL 应用程序在两个截然不同的集群（一个四节点 ARM 集群和一个八节点 x86 集群）上运行来评估 LOCAT。 ARM 集群上的实验结果表明，LOCAT 将最先进方法的优化过程加速至少 4.1 倍，最高可达 9.7 倍；此外，LOCAT 将应用程序性能提高至少 1.9 倍，最高可达 2.4 倍。在 x86 集群上，LOCAT 显示的结果与 ARM 集群上的结果相似。

papers.title: LSched: A Workload-Aware Learned Query Scheduler for Analytical Database Systems.
papers.abstract: Query scheduling is a crucial task for analytical database systems that can greatly affect the query latency. However, existing scheduling approaches are based on heuristics and not optimal. A recent trial proposed to use reinforcement learning for automatically learning end-to-end scheduling policies. However, such trial was not capable of considering the database-specific characteristics (e.g., operator types, pipelining), and hence becomes not efficient for analytical database systems. In this paper, we try to fill this gap and introduce LSched (Learned Scheduler), a fully learned workload-aware query scheduler for in-memory analytical database systems. LSched provides an efficient inter-query and intra-query scheduling for dynamic analytical workloads (i.e., different queries can arrive/depart at any time). We integrated LSched with an efficient in-memory analytical database system, and evaluated it with TPCH, SSB, and JOB benchmarks. Our evaluation shows that LSched improves over the performance of existing state-of-the-art query schedulers and heuristic-based ones by at least 35% and 50% in both streaming and batching query workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 查询调度是分析数据库系统的一项关键任务，可以极大地影响查询延迟。然而，现有的调度方法是基于启发式的，而不是最优的。最近的一项试验提出使用强化学习来自动学习端到端调度策略。然而，这样的试验无法考虑数据库特定的特征（例如，运算符类型、管道），因此对于分析数据库系统来说效率不高。在本文中，我们试图填补这一空白，并引入LSched（学习调度程序），这是一种用于内存分析数据库系统的完全学习的工作负载感知查询调度程序。 LSched 为动态分析工作负载提供高效的查询间和查询内调度（即不同的查询可以随时到达/离开）。我们将 LSched 与高效的内存分析数据库系统集成，并使用 TPCH、SSB 和 JOB 基准对其进行评估。我们的评估表明，在流式处理和批处理查询工作负载中，LSched 比现有最先进的查询调度程序和基于启发式的查询调度程序的性能分别提高了至少 35% 和 50%。

papers.title: Materialization and Reuse Optimizations for Production Data Science Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Many companies and businesses train and deploy machine learning (ML) pipelines to answer prediction queries. In many applications, new training data continuously becomes available. A typical approach to ensure that ML models are up-to-date is to retrain the ML pipelines following a schedule, e.g., every day on the last seven days of data. Several use cases, such as A/B testing and ensemble learning, require many pipelines to be deployed in parallel. Existing solutions train each pipeline separately, which generates redundant data processing. Our goal is to eliminate redundant data processing in such scenarios using materialization and reuse optimizations. Our solution comprises of two main parts. First, we propose a materialization algorithm that given a storage budget, materializes the subset of the artifacts to minimize the run time of the subsequent executions. Second, we design a reuse algorithm to generate an execution plan by combining the pipelines into a directed acyclic graph (DAG) and reusing the materialized artifacts when appropriate. Our experiments show that our solution can reduce the training time by up to an order of magnitude for different deployment scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多公司和企业训练和部署机器学习 (ML) 管道来回答预测查询。在许多应用中，新的训练数据不断可用。确保 ML 模型保持最新的典型方法是按照计划重新训练 ML 管道，例如，每天根据最近 7 天的数据进行重新训练。一些用例（例如 A/B 测试和集成学习）需要并行部署许多管道。现有的解决方案单独训练每个管道，这会产生冗余的数据处理。我们的目标是使用物化和重用优化来消除此类场景中的冗余数据处理。我们的解决方案由两个主要部分组成。首先，我们提出了一种物化算法，在给定存储预算的情况下，物化工件的子集以最小化后续执行的运行时间。其次，我们设计了一种重用算法，通过将管道组合成有向无环图（DAG）并在适当时重用物化工件来生成执行计划。我们的实验表明，我们的解决方案可以针对不同的部署场景将训练时间减少一个数量级。

papers.title: MinMax Sampling: A Near-optimal Global Summary for Aggregation in the Wide Area.
papers.abstract: Nowadays, wide-area data analyses are pervasive with emerging geo-distributed systems. These analyses often need to do the global aggregation in the wide area. Since scarce and variable WAN bandwidth may degrade the aggregation performance, it is highly desired to design a communication scheme for global aggregation in WAN. Unfortunately, no existing algorithm can meet the three design requirements of communication schemes: fast computation, adaptive transmission, and accurate aggregation. In this paper, we propose MinMax Sampling, a fast, adaptive, and accurate communication scheme for global aggregation in WAN. We first focus on the accuracy and design a scheme, namely MinMaxopt, to achieve optimal accuracy. However, MinMaxopt does not meet the other two requirements: fast computation and adaptive transmission. Based on MinMaxopt, we propose MinMaxadp, which trades little accuracy for the other two requirements. We evaluate MinMaxadp with three applications: federated learning, distributed state aggregation, and hierarchical aggregation. Our experimental results show that MinMaxadp is superior to existing algorithms (8.44× better accuracy on average) in all three applications. The source codes of MinMax Sampling are available at Github [1].
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，广域数据分析在新兴的地理分布式系统中普遍存在。这些分析往往需要在广域内进行全局聚合。由于广域网带宽的稀缺和变化可能会降低聚合性能，因此非常需要设计一种用于广域网中全局聚合的通信方案。不幸的是，现有的算法都无法满足通信方案的三个设计要求：快速计算、自适应传输和精确聚合。在本文中，我们提出了 MinMax Sampling，这是一种用于 WAN 中全局聚合的快速、自适应且准确的通信方案。我们首先关注精度并设计一个方案，即MinMaxopt，以达到最佳精度。然而，MinMaxopt 不满足另外两个要求：快速计算和自适应传输。基于MinMaxopt，我们提出了MinMaxadp，它以很少的精度换取了其他两个要求。我们使用三种应用来评估 MinMaxadp：联邦学习、分布式状态聚合和分层聚合。我们的实验结果表明，MinMaxadp 在所有三种应用中均优于现有算法（平均精度提高 8.44 倍）。 MinMax Sampling 的源代码可在 Github [1] 上找到。

papers.title: Mondrian: Spreadsheet Layout Detection.
papers.abstract: Spreadsheet datasets are valuable sources of data, but often ill-suited for machine consumption. Their unstructured nature allows users to arrange data and metadata freely in a human-readable format, often in canvas-like layouts. To extract their content, data practitioners need to resort to manual inspection and run cumbersome preparation pipelines. The Mondrian system assists users in identifying and handling multiregion layout templates: spreadsheet layouts composed of independent regions that appear repeatedly across different files. Mondrian comprises an automated approach to detect multiple regions within a single file and an algorithm that leverages mapping region layouts to graphs to compute layout similarity and identify templates. Users interact with Mondrian through a web-based visual interface, that serves as a practical toolkit to handle collections of multiregion spreadsheets and enables their automated preparation.
papers.abstract_zh: 电子表格数据集是有价值的数据源，但通常不适合机器使用。它们的非结构化性质允许用户以人类可读的格式自由排列数据和元数据，通常采用类似画布的布局。为了提取内容，数据从业者需要诉诸手动检查并运行繁琐的准备管道。 Mondrian 系统可帮助用户识别和处理多区域布局模板：由在不同文件中重复出现的独立区域组成的电子表格布局。 Mondrian 包括一种自动检测单个文件中多个区域的方法，以及一种利用将区域布局映射到图形来计算布局相似性并识别模板的算法。用户通过基于网络的可视化界面与 Mondrian 进行交互，该界面可作为处理多区域电子表格集合并实现自动准备的实用工具包。

papers.title: Multi-Tenant Cloud Data Services: State-of-the-Art, Challenges and Opportunities.
papers.abstract: Enterprises are moving their business-critical workloads to public clouds at an accelerating pace. Multi-tenancy is a crucial tenet for cloud data service providers allowing them to provide services in cost-effective manner by sharing of resources among tenants of the service. In this tutorial we review architectures of today's cloud data services and identify trends and challenges that arise in multi-tenant cloud data services. We discuss techniques that have been developed for enabling elasticity, providing SLAs, ensuring performance isolation, and reducing cost. We conclude with open research problems in cloud data services.
papers.abstract_zh: 企业正在加速将其关键业务工作负载转移到公共云。多租户是云数据服务提供商的一个重要原则，允许他们通过在服务租户之间共享资源来以经济高效的方式提供服务。在本教程中，我们回顾当今云数据服务的架构，并确定多租户云数据服务中出现的趋势和挑战。我们讨论为实现弹性、提供 SLA、确保性能隔离和降低成本而开发的技术。我们以云数据服务中的开放研究问题作为结束语。

papers.title: Natto: Providing Distributed Transaction Prioritization for High-Contention Workloads.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Natto, a geo-distributed database system that supports transaction prioritization. Instead of having each shard process transactions in their arrival order, Natto leverages network measurements to estimate the transaction arrival time at each shard, and assigns a timestamp to the transaction based on its arrival time to the furthest shard. These timestamps establish a global ordering of transactions, and introduces opportunities to selectively abort pending low-priority transactions that conflict with a high-priority transaction, or even preempt transactions that are already partially prepared. Our experiments on both Microsoft Azure and a local cluster show that Natto's tail latency for high-priority transactions are significantly lower than the tail latencies of Carousel and TAPIR, which are the current state-of-the-art in geo-distributed transaction processing systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Natto，一个支持事务优先级的地理分布式数据库系统。 Natto 不是让每个分片按其到达顺序处理交易，而是利用网络测量来估计每个分片的交易到达时间，并根据交易到达最远分片的时间为其分配时间戳。这些时间戳建立了事务的全局排序，并引入了选择性中止与高优先级事务冲突的待处理低优先级事务的机会，甚至抢占已经部分准备好的事务。我们在 Microsoft Azure 和本地集群上的实验表明，Natto 对于高优先级事务的尾部延迟明显低于 Carousel 和 TAPIR 的尾部延迟，后者是地理分布式事务处理系统中当前最先进的技术。

papers.title: Nautilus: An Optimized System for Deep Transfer Learning over Evolving Training Datasets.
papers.abstract: Deep learning (DL) has revolutionized unstructured data analytics. But in most cases, DL needs massive labeled datasets and large compute clusters, which hinders its adoption. These limitations can be overcome using a popular paradigm called deep transfer learning (DTL). With DTL, one adapts a pre-trained DL model instead of training a model from scratch. Thus, DTL reduces the massive training data and compute requirements to train a model. During adaptation, a common practice is to freeze most pre-trained model parts and adapt only the remaining. Since no single adaptation scheme is universally the best, one often evaluates several schemes, which is also called model selection. We also observed that data labeling for DTL is seldom a one-off process. One often updates their labeled data intermittently by adding new labeled data and performs model selection to evaluate the accuracy of the trained models. Today, one executes this workload by performing computations for the entire pre-trained model and repeats it for every model selection cycle. This approach results in redundant computations in frozen model parts and causes usability and system inefficiency issues. In this work, we reimagine DTL model selection in the presence of frozen layers as an instance of multi-query optimization and propose two optimizations that reduce redundant computations and training overheads. We implement our optimizations into a data system called Nautilus. Experiments with end-to-end workloads on benchmark datasets show that Nautilus reduces DTL model selection runtimes by up to 5X compared to the current practice.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 彻底改变了非结构化数据分析。但在大多数情况下，深度学习需要大量标记数据集和大型计算集群，这阻碍了它的采用。这些限制可以使用称为深度迁移学习 (DTL) 的流行范例来克服。通过 DTL，我们可以调整预先训练的深度学习模型，而不是从头开始训练模型。因此，DTL 减少了训练模型所需的大量训练数据和计算需求。在适应过程中，常见的做法是冻结大多数预训练的模型部分并仅适应剩余的部分。由于没有一种适应方案是普遍最好的，因此人们经常评估多种方案，这也称为模型选择。我们还观察到 DTL 的数据标记很少是一次性过程。人们经常通过添加新的标记数据来间歇性地更新其标记数据，并执行模型选择来评估训练模型的准确性。如今，人们通过对整个预训练模型执行计算来执行此工作负载，并在每个模型选择周期中重复该计算。这种方法会导致冻结模型部件中的冗余计算，并导致可用性和系统效率低下的问题。在这项工作中，我们重新设想了存在冻结层的 DTL 模型选择作为多查询优化的实例，并提出了两种减少冗余计算和训练开销的优化。我们将优化实施到名为 Nautilus 的数据系统中。在基准数据集上进行的端到端工作负载实验表明，与当前实践相比，Nautilus 将 DTL 模型选择运行时间减少了多达 5 倍。

papers.title: Network Shuffling: Privacy Amplification via Random Walks.
papers.abstract:
Recently, it is shown that shuffling can amplify the central differential privacy guarantees of data randomized with local differential privacy. Within this setup, a centralized, trusted shuffler is responsible for shuffling by keeping the identities of data anonymous, which subsequently leads to stronger privacy guarantees for systems. However, introducing a centralized entity to the originally local privacy model loses some appeals of not having any centralized entity as in local differential privacy. Moreover, implementing a shuffler in a reliable way is not trivial due to known security issues and/or requirements of advanced hardware or secure computation technology.

Motivated by these practical considerations, we rethink the shuffle model to relax the assumption of requiring a centralized, trusted shuffler. We introduce network shuffling, a decentralized mechanism where users exchange data in a random-walk fashion on a network/graph, as an alternative of achieving privacy amplification via anonymity. We analyze the threat model under such a setting, and propose distributed protocols of network shuffling that is straightforward to implement in practice. Furthermore, we show that the privacy amplification rate is similar to other privacy amplification techniques such as uniform shuffling. To our best knowledge, among the recently studied intermediate trust models that leverage privacy amplification techniques, our work is the first that is not relying on any centralized entity to achieve privacy amplification.
papers.abstract_zh:
最近，研究表明，混洗可以放大使用本地差分隐私随机化的数据的中央差分隐私保证。在此设置中，一个集中的、可信的洗牌器负责通过保持数据身份匿名来进行洗牌，从而为系统带来更强的隐私保证。然而，在原来的本地隐私模型中引入中心化实体，失去了本地差分隐私中没有中心化实体的一些吸引力。此外，由于已知的安全问题和/或先进硬件或安全计算技术的要求，以可靠的方式实现洗牌器并非易事。

出于这些实际考虑的动机，我们重新考虑洗牌模型，以放宽需要集中式、可信洗牌器的假设。我们引入网络洗牌，这是一种去中心化机制，用户在网络/图上以随机游走的方式交换数据，作为通过匿名实现隐私放大的替代方案。我们分析了这种设置下的威胁模型，并提出了在实践中易于实现的分布式网络改组协议。此外，我们表明隐私放大率与其他隐私放大技术（例如均匀洗牌）相似。据我们所知，在最近研究的利用隐私放大技术的中间信任模型中，我们的工作是第一个不依赖任何中心化实体来实现隐私放大的工作。

papers.title: Neural Subgraph Counting with Wasserstein Estimator.
papers.abstract:
Subgraph counting is a fundamental graph analysis task which has been widely used in many applications. As the problem of subgraph counting is NP-complete and hence intractable, approximate solutions have been widely studied, which fail to work with large and complex query graphs. Alternatively, Machine Learning techniques have been recently applied for this problem, yet the existing ML approaches either only support very small data graphs or cannot make full use of the data graph information, which inherently limits their scalability, estimation accuracies and robustness.

In this paper, we propose a novel approximate subgraph counting algorithm, NeurSC, that can exploit and combine information from both the query graphs and the data graphs effectively and efficiently. It consists of two components: (1) an extraction module that adaptively generates simple yet representative substructures from data graph for each query graph and (2) an estimator WEst that first computes the representations from individual and joint distributions of query and data graphs and then estimates subgraph counts with the learned representations. Furthermore, we design a novel Wasserstein discriminator in WEst to minimize the Wasserstein distance between query and data graphs by updating the parameters in network with the vertex correspondence relationship between query and data graphs. By doing this, WEst can better capture the correlation between query and data graphs which is essential to the quality of the estimation. We conduct experimental studies on seven large real-life labeled graphs to demonstrate the superior performance of NeurSC in terms of estimation accuracy and robustness.
papers.abstract_zh:
子图计数是一项基本的图分析任务，已广泛应用于许多应用中。由于子图计数问题是 NP 完全问题，因此非常棘手，因此近似解决方案已被广泛研究，但它不适用于大型且复杂的查询图。另外，机器学习技术最近已被应用于解决这个问题，但现有的机器学习方法要么只支持非常小的数据图，要么无法充分利用数据图信息，这本质上限制了它们的可扩展性、估计精度和鲁棒性。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的近似子图计数算法 NeurSC，它可以有效且高效地利用和组合来自查询图和数据图的信息。它由两个组件组成：（1）一个提取模块，它从数据图中自适应地为每个查询图生成简单但有代表性的子结构；（2）一个估计器 WEst，它首先计算查询和数据图的单独分布和联合分布的表示，然后用学习到的表示估计子图计数。此外，我们在 WEst 中设计了一种新颖的 Wasserstein 判别器，通过使用查询和数据图之间的顶点对应关系更新网络中的参数来最小化查询和数据图之间的 Wasserstein 距离。通过这样做，WEst 可以更好地捕获查询和数据图之间的相关性，这对于估计的质量至关重要。我们对七个大型现实生活标记图进行了实验研究，以证明 NeurSC 在估计准确性和鲁棒性方面的优越性能。

papers.title: NeutronStar: Distributed GNN Training with Hybrid Dependency Management.
papers.abstract: GNN's training needs to resolve issues of vertex dependencies, i.e., each vertex representation's update depends on its neighbors. Existing distributed GNN systems adopt either a dependencies-cached approach or a dependencies-communicated approach. Having made intensive experiments and analysis, we find that a decision to choose one or the other approach for the best performance is determined by a set of factors, including graph inputs, model configurations, and an underlying computing cluster environment. If various GNN trainings are supported solely by one approach, the performance results are often suboptimal. We study related factors for each GNN training before its execution to choose the best-fit approach accordingly. We propose a hybrid dependency-handling approach that adaptively takes the merits of the two approaches at runtime. Based on the hybrid approach, we further develop a distributed GNN training system called NeutronStar, which makes high performance GNN trainings in an automatic way. NeutronStar is also empowered by effective optimizations in CPU-GPU computation and data processing. Our experimental results on 16-node Aliyun cluster demonstrate that NeutronStar achieves 1.81X-14.25X speedup over existing GNN systems including DistDGL and ROC.
papers.abstract_zh: GNN 的训练需要解决顶点依赖问题，即每个顶点表示的更新依赖于其邻居。现有的分布式 GNN 系统采用依赖项缓存方法或依赖项通信方法。经过深入的实验和分析，我们发现选择一种或另一种方法以获得最佳性能的决定是由一组因素决定的，包括图形输入、模型配置和底层计算集群环境。如果仅通过一种方法支持各种 GNN 训练，则性能结果通常不是最佳的。我们在执行每个 GNN 训练之前研究相关因素，以相应地选择最适合的方法。我们提出了一种混合依赖性处理方法，该方法在运行时自适应地利用两种方法的优点。基于混合方法，我们进一步开发了一个名为 NeutronStar 的分布式 GNN 训练系统，它以自动方式进行高性能 GNN 训练。 NeutronStar 还通过 CPU-GPU 计算和数据处理的有效优化提供支持。我们在 16 节点阿里云集群上的实验结果表明，NeutronStar 比现有的 GNN 系统（包括 DistDGL 和 ROC）实现了 1.81 倍至 14.25 倍的加速。

papers.title: NuPS: A Parameter Server for Machine Learning with Non-Uniform Parameter Access.
papers.abstract: Parameter servers (PSs) facilitate the implementation of distributed training for large machine learning tasks. In this paper, we argue that existing PSs are inefficient for tasks that exhibit non-uniform parameter access; their performance may even fall behind that of single node baselines. We identify two major sources of such non-uniform access: skew and sampling. Existing PSs are ill-suited for managing skew because they uniformly apply the same parameter management technique to all parameters. They are inefficient for sampling because the PS is oblivious to the associated randomized accesses and cannot exploit locality. To overcome these performance limitations, we introduce NuPS, a novel PS architecture that (i) integrates multiple management techniques and employs a suitable technique for each parameter and (ii) supports sampling directly via suitable sampling primitives and sampling schemes that allow for a controlled quality-efficiency trade-off. In our experimental study, NuPS outperformed existing PSs by up to one order of magnitude and provided up to linear scalability across multiple machine learning tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 参数服务器（PS）有助于实现大型机器学习任务的分布式训练。在本文中，我们认为现有的 PS 对于表现出非均匀参数访问的任务效率低下；它们的性能甚至可能落后于单节点基线。我们确定了这种不均匀访问的两个主要来源：倾斜和采样。现有的 PS 不适合管理偏差，因为它们对所有参数统一应用相同的参数管理技术。它们的采样效率很低，因为 PS 不知道相关的随机访问并且无法利用局部性。为了克服这些性能限制，我们引入了 NuPS，这是一种新颖的 PS 架构，它（i）集成了多种管理技术并为每个参数采用合适的技术，并且（ii）支持通过合适的采样原语和采样方案直接采样，从而实现受控的质量效率权衡。在我们的实验研究中，NuPS 的性能比现有 PS 提高了一个数量级，并在多个机器学习任务中提供了线性可扩展性。

papers.title: On a Quest for Combating Filter Bubbles and Misinformation.
papers.abstract:
The advent of social networks and media has made it easier than ever for users to access up-to-date information as well as share news and views on matters of the world with many of their peers. Unfortunately, it has also led to increased societal polarization as well as deteriorating trust in institutions. Two of the problems that are blamed for this are filter bubbles and misinformation. Filter bubbles are the result of excessive personalization which has the benefit of enhancing relevance but comes at the price of limiting the exposure of users to a specific viewpoint. They are amplified by the so-called echo chambers that exist in social media, whereby members of a community mutually reinforce a fixed opinion or viewpoint on an issue. Misinformation, on the other hand, tends to propagate through the network, and studies show it does so faster and more virally than truth.

Both problems manifest themselves in the form of groups of actors working in concert and providing mutual reinforcement. How can we recognize these groups? Having detected them, how can we counteract these problems? The first question can benefit from an examination of techniques developed to search for communities or more generally dense subgraphs from an underlying network. As for the second question, a natural approach for countering filter bubbles is to launch some kind of counter-campaign to try and enhance the balance in users' exposure to viewpoints. Countermeasures for misinformation propagating through a network, on the other hand, are manifold and can depend on who is planning the countermeasure. For example, the network host can intervene and take steps to limit the propagation of misinformation, but these actions come with a cost. Besides the political sensitivity and cost of limiting freedom of expression, what if the intervention was by mistake done on genuine information? As another example, a third party interested in countering the propagation of misinformation may launch a counter-campaign. Interestingly, some of the ideas behind designing such campaigns have strong connections to a classic problem called Influence Maximization, studied in a very different context, driven by different applications like viral marketing, infection containment, and revenue or welfare maximization. In this talk, we will examine research on detecting dense subgraphs as well as competitive influence maximization and discuss how that can inspire techniques for addressing the two problems above.
papers.abstract_zh:
社交网络和媒体的出现使用户比以往任何时候都更容易获取最新信息以及与许多同龄人分享有关世界事务的新闻和观点。不幸的是，这也导致了社会两极分化的加剧以及对机构信任的恶化。造成这种情况的两个问题是过滤气泡和错误信息。过滤气泡是过度个性化的结果，它的好处是增强相关性，但代价是限制用户接触特定的观点。它们被社交媒体中存在的所谓回声室放大，社区成员通过社交媒体相互强化对某个问题的固定意见或观点。另一方面，错误信息往往通过网络传播，研究表明它比事实传播得更快、更具有病毒性。

这两个问题都以行动者群体协同工作并相互加强的形式表现出来。我们如何认识这些群体？发现这些问题后，我们该如何应对这些问题呢？第一个问题可以受益于对从底层网络中搜索社区或更普遍的密集子图而开发的技术的检查。至于第二个问题，对抗过滤泡沫的一个自然方法是发起某种反运动，以尝试增强用户接触观点的平衡。另一方面，针对通过网络传播错误信息的对策是多种多样的，并且可能取决于谁在计划对策。例如，网络主机可以进行干预并采取措施限制错误信息的传播，但这些行为是有代价的。除了限制言论自由的政治敏感性和成本之外，如果错误地根据真实信息进行干预怎么办？作为另一个例子，对打击错误信息传播感兴趣的第三方可能会发起反运动。有趣的是，设计此类活动背后的一些想法与一个名为“影响力最大化”的经典问题有着密切的联系，该问题是在一个非常不同的背景下进行研究的，受到病毒式营销、感染遏制以及收入或福利最大化等不同应用的驱动。在本次演讲中，我们将研究检测密集子图以及竞争影响力最大化的研究，并讨论如何激发解决上述两个问题的技术。

papers.title: On Scalable Computation of Graph Eccentricities.
papers.abstract: Given a graph, eccentricity measures the distance from each node to its farthest node. Eccentricity indicates the centrality of each node and collectively encodes fundamental graph properties: the radius and the diameter --- the minimum and maximum eccentricity, respectively, over all the nodes in the graph. Computing the eccentricities for all the graph nodes, however, is challenging in theory: any approach shall either complete in quadratic time or introduce a 1/3 relative error under certain hypotheses. In practice, the state-of-the-art approach PLLECC in computing exact eccentricities relies heavily on a precomputed all-pair-shortest-distance index whose expensive construction refrains PLLECC from scaling up. This paper provides insights to enable scalable exact eccentricity computation that does not rely on any index. The proposed algorithm IFECC handles billion-scale graphs that no existing approach can process and achieves up to two orders of magnitude speedup over PLLECC. As a by-product, IFECC can be terminated at any time during execution to produce approximate eccentricities, which is empirically more stable and reliable than KBFS, the state-of-the-art algorithm for approximately computing eccentricities.
papers.abstract_zh: 给定一个图，偏心率测量从每个节点到最远节点的距离。偏心率指示每个节点的中心性，并共同编码基本图属性：半径和直径——分别是图中所有节点的最小和最大偏心率。然而，计算所有图节点的偏心率在理论上是具有挑战性的：任何方法要么在二次时间内完成，要么在某些假设下引入 1/3 相对误差。在实践中，计算精确偏心率的最先进方法 PLLECC 在很大程度上依赖于预先计算的全对最短距离指数，其昂贵的结构限制了 PLLECC 的扩展。本文提供了一些见解，以实现不依赖于任何索引的可扩展的精确偏心率计算。所提出的算法 IFECC 可以处理现有方法无法处理的十亿级图，并且比 PLLECC 实现高达两个数量级的加速。作为副产品，IFECC 可以在执行过程中随时终止以产生近似偏心率，这在经验上比 KBFS（用于近似计算偏心率的最先进算法）更加稳定和可靠。

papers.title: One Set to Cover All Maximal Cliques Approximately.
papers.abstract: Maximal clique, the most cohesive structure in a graph, has a broad range of applications, e.g., community detection, bioinformatics, anomaly detection, and graph visualization. However, the sheer number of maximal cliques brings the challenge to fully examine them all. In addition, the omnipresent overlaps between cliques imply that it may not be necessary to process every maximal clique, since many vertices are shared in multiple cliques. A real example is that, in commercial advertising, a small group of individuals who participate in different communities can help spread an advertisement across all the communities. Inspired by this observation, we study the problem of finding a τ-cover, which is a subset of vertices in a graph. This subset overlaps with each maximal clique by no less than τ, where τ is a threshold reflecting the user's requirement. We prove the NP-hardness and the non-submodularity of finding a minimum τ-cover. As a result, to find a small τ-cover as best effort, we propose three methods: MCCb, MCC, and EMCC. MCCb is a baseline that adds vertices into the cover while doing clique enumeration until the coverage requirement is satisfied. MCC decides whether to add a vertex with more caution by evaluating the increment of coverage lower bound with O(1) time complexity. EMCC is a randomized algorithm built on an elegant adaptive sampling, which further achieves cover conciseness by relaxing the coverage requirement in a statistical manner. Extensive experiments show that MCC (1.3 ∽ 2.5 × faster) produces a cover whose size is 1/2 of MCCb, and EMCC (2 ∽ 5 × faster) averagely produces a cover whose size is one order of magnitude smaller vs. MCCb.
papers.abstract_zh: 最大团是图中最具凝聚力的结构，具有广泛的应用，例如社区检测、生物信息学、异常检测和图形可视化。然而，最大派系的数量之多给全面检查它们带来了挑战。此外，派系之间无所不在的重叠意味着可能没有必要处理每个最大派系，因为许多顶点在多个派系中共享。一个真实的例子是，在商业广告中，参与不同社区的一小群人可以帮助将广告传播到所有社区。受这一观察的启发，我们研究了寻找 τ 覆盖的问题，它是图中顶点的子集。该子集与每个最大团的重叠不少于τ，其中τ是反映用户需求的阈值。我们证明了寻找最小 τ 覆盖的 NP 难度和非子模性。因此，为了尽最大努力找到小的 τ-cover，我们提出了三种方法：MCCb、MCC 和 EMCC。 MCCb 是一条基线，在进行团枚举时将顶点添加到覆盖中，直到满足覆盖要求。 MCC通过以O(1)时间复杂度评估覆盖下界的增量来决定是否更谨慎地添加顶点。 EMCC 是一种基于优雅自适应采样的随机算法，通过以统计方式放宽覆盖要求，进一步实现覆盖简洁性。大量实验表明，MCC（快 1.3 ∽ 2.5 × 快）产生的 cover 大小是 MCCb 的 1/2，而 EMCC（快 2 ∽ 5 × 快）平均产生的 cover 大小比 MCCb 小一个数量级。

papers.title: One Size Does Not Fit All: A Bandit-Based Sampler Combination Framework with Theoretical Guarantees.
papers.abstract: Sample-based estimation, which uses a sample to estimate population parameters (e.g., SUM, COUNT, and AVG), has various applications in database systems. A sampler defines how samples are drawn from a population. Various samplers have been proposed (e.g., uniform sampler, stratified sampler, and measure-biased sampler), since there is no single sampler that works well in all cases. To overcome the "one size does not fit all" challenge, we study how to combine multiple samplers to estimate population parameters, and propose SamComb, a novel bandit-based sampler combination framework. Given a set of samplers, a budget, and a population parameter, SamComb can automatically decide how much budget should be allocated to each sampler so that the combined estimation achieves the highest accuracy. We model this sampler combination problem as a multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem and propose effective approaches to balance the exploration and exploitation trade-off in a principled way. We provide theoretical guarantees for our approaches and conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets. The results show that there is a strong need to combine multiple samplers, in order to obtain accurate estimations without the knowledge about population predicates and distributions, and SamComb is an effective framework to achieve this goal.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于样本的估计，使用样本来估计总体参数（例如，SUM、COUNT 和 AVG），在数据库系统中具有多种应用。采样器定义如何从总体中抽取样本。人们已经提出了各种采样器（例如均匀采样器、分层采样器和测量偏差采样器），因为没有一个采样器可以在所有情况下都能很好地工作。为了克服“一刀切”的挑战，我们研究了如何组合多个采样器来估计总体参数，并提出了 SamComb，一种新颖的基于 bandit 的采样器组合框架。给定一组采样器、预算和总体参数，SamComb 可以自动决定应为每个采样器分配多少预算，以便组合估计达到最高准确度。我们将此采样器组合问题建模为多臂老虎机（MAB）问题，并提出有效的方法来以原则性的方式平衡探索和利用权衡。我们为我们的方法提供理论保证，并在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行广泛的实验。结果表明，强烈需要组合多个采样器，以便在不了解总体谓词和分布的情况下获得准确的估计，而 SamComb 是实现这一目标的有效框架。

papers.title: OpenTFV: An Open Domain Table-Based Fact Verification System.
papers.abstract: The prevalence of misinformation, both online and offline, has prompted a great demand of fact verification. Table-based fact verification aims to check whether a textual claim is supported or refuted based on relational tables. However, most of the existing approaches are in a closed-domain setting, which may not be realistic in practice. To address this problem, in this paper, we introduce OpenTFV, a user-friendly system that supports open domain table-based fact verification. Given a claim input by an end-user, OpenTFV retrieves the relevant tables, and provides a verification result for each table with an intuitive interpretation in natural language. We have implemented OpenTFV and demonstrated OpenTFV in two representative scenarios, COVID-19 claims fact verification based on academic tables and general fact verification on Wiki-tables.
papers.abstract_zh: 线上线下错误信息的盛行引发了对事实核实的巨大需求。基于表格的事实验证旨在根据关系表检查文本主张是否得到支持或反驳。然而，大多数现有方法都处于封闭域环境中，这在实践中可能不现实。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们引入了 OpenTFV，一个用户友好的系统，支持基于开放域表的事实验证。给定最终用户输入的声明，OpenTFV 检索相关表，并以自然语言的直观解释提供每个表的验证结果。我们已经实现了 OpenTFV，并在两个代表性场景中演示了 OpenTFV：COVID-19 声称基于学术表格的事实验证和基于 Wiki 表的一般事实验证。

papers.title: Optimizing Data-intensive Systems in Disaggregated Data Centers with TELEPORT.
papers.abstract: Recent proposals for the disaggregation of compute, memory, storage, and accelerators in data centers promise substantial operational benefits. Unfortunately, for resources like memory, this comes at the cost of performance overhead due to the potential insertion of network latency into every load and store operation. This effect is particularly felt by data-intensive systems due to the size of their working sets, the frequency at which they need to access memory, and the relatively low computation per access. This performance impairment offsets the elasticity benefit of disaggregated memory. This paper presents TELEPORT, a compute pushdown framework for data-intensive systems that run on disaggregated architectures; compared to prior work on compute pushdown, TELEPORT is unique in its efficiency and flexibility. We have developed optimization prin- ciples for several popular systems including a columnar in-memory DBMS, a graph processing system, and a MapReduce system. The evaluation results show that using TELEPORT to push down simple operators improves the performance of these systems on state-of-the-art disaggregated OSes by an order of magnitude, thus fully exploiting the elasticity of disaggregated data centers.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近关于数据中心计算、内存、存储和加速器分解的提议有望带来巨大的运营效益。不幸的是，对于内存等资源来说，这是以性能开销为代价的，因为每个加载和存储操作中都可能插入网络延迟。由于数据密集型系统工作集的大小、访问内存的频率以及每次访问的计算量相对较低，这种影响尤其明显。这种性能损害抵消了分解内存的弹性优势。本文介绍了 TELEPORT，这是一种用于在分解架构上运行的数据密集型系统的计算下推框架；与之前的计算下推工作相比，TELEPORT 的独特之处在于其效率和灵活性。我们为几种流行的系统开发了优化原则，包括柱状内存 DBMS、图形处理系统和 MapReduce 系统。评估结果表明，使用 TELEPORT 下推简单操作符可以将这些系统在最先进的分类操作系统上的性能提高一个数量级，从而充分利用分类数据中心的弹性。

papers.title: Optimizing Parallel Recursive Datalog Evaluation on Multicore Machines.
papers.abstract: Over the past years, there has been a resurgence of interest in Datalog due to its superior ability of expressing applications that require recursive computations. However, in addition to expressive power, supporting analytical tasks with ever-increasing volume of data requires high performance and scalability. In this paper, we present DCDatalog, an in-memory Datalog engine specifically designed for modern shared-memory multicore architectures. Our key contribution is a novel system architecture that supports a wide scope of Datalog applications with a light-weight coordination scheme during parallel evaluation. To this end, we propose a dynamic scheduling strategy that can generate the parallel execution plan on-the-fly while reducing concurrent accesses to the shared memory. Experimental results on several large datasets show that our system significantly outperforms existing parallel Datalog engines and also scales well with increasing amount of data.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们对 Datalog 的兴趣重新燃起，因为它具有表达需要递归计算的应用程序的卓越能力。然而，除了表达能力之外，支持不断增加的数据量的分析任务还需要高性能和可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍了 DCDatalog，这是一种专门为现代共享内存多核架构设计的内存数据记录引擎。我们的主要贡献是一种新颖的系统架构，它在并行评估期间通过轻量级协调方案支持广泛的数据记录应用程序。为此，我们提出了一种动态调度策略，可以动态生成并行执行计划，同时减少对共享内存的并发访问。在几个大型数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的系统显着优于现有的并行数据记录引擎，并且随着数据量的增加也可以很好地扩展。

papers.title: Optimizing Recursive Queries with Progam Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Most work on query optimization has concentrated on loop-free queries. However, data science and machine learning workloads today typically involve recursive or iterative computation. In this work, we propose a novel framework for optimizing recursive queries using methods from program synthesis. In particular, we introduce a simple yet powerful optimization rule called the "FGH-rule" which aims to find a faster way to evaluate a recursive program. The solution is found by making use of powerful tools, such as a program synthesizer, an SMT-solver, and an equality saturation system. We demonstrate the strength of the optimization by showing that the FGH-rule can lead to speedups up to 4 orders of magnitude on three, already optimized Datalog systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 大多数查询优化工作都集中在无循环查询上。然而，当今的数据科学和机器学习工作负载通常涉及递归或迭代计算。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用程序综合方法来优化递归查询的新颖框架。特别是，我们引入了一种简单而强大的优化规则，称为“FGH 规则”，旨在找到一种更快的方法来评估递归程序。该解决方案是通过使用强大的工具找到的，例如程序合成器、SMT 求解器和等式饱和系统。我们通过展示 FGH 规则可以在三个已经优化的数据记录系统上实现高达 4 个数量级的加速来展示优化的强度。

papers.title: OTIF: Efficient Tracker Pre-processing over Large Video Datasets.
papers.abstract:
Performing analytics tasks over large-scale video datasets is increasingly common in a wide range of applications, from traffic planning to sports analytics. These tasks generally involve object detection and tracking operations that require pre-processing the video through expensive machine learning models. To address this cost, several video query optimizers have recently been proposed. Broadly, these methods trade large reductions in pre-processing cost for increases in query execution cost: during query execution, they apply query-specific machine learning operations over portions of the video dataset. Although video query optimizers reduce the overall cost of executing a single query over large video datasets compared to naive object tracking methods, executing several queries over the same video remains cost-prohibitive; moreover, the high per-query latency makes these systems unsuitable for exploratory analytics where fast response times are crucial.

In this paper, we present OTIF, a video pre-processor that efficiently extracts all object tracks from large-scale video datasets. By integrating several optimizations under a joint parameter tuning framework, OTIF is able to extract all object tracks from video as fast as existing video query optimizers can execute just one single query. In contrast to the outputs of video query optimizers, OTIF's outputs are general-purpose object tracks that can be used to execute many queries with sub-second latencies. We compare OTIF against three recent video query optimizers, as well as several general-purpose object detection and tracking techniques, and find that, across multiple datasets, OTIF provides a 6x to 25x average reduction in the overall cost to execute five queries over the same video.
papers.abstract_zh:
从交通规划到体育分析，对大规模视频数据集执行分析任务在各种应用中越来越常见。这些任务通常涉及对象检测和跟踪操作，需要通过昂贵的机器学习模型对视频进行预处理。为了解决这一成本，最近提出了几种视频查询优化器。从广义上讲，这些方法以预处理成本的大幅降低来换取查询执行成本的增加：在查询执行期间，它们对视频数据集的部分应用特定于查询的机器学习操作。尽管与简单的对象跟踪方法相比，视频查询优化器降低了对大型视频数据集执行单个查询的总体成本，但对同一视频执行多个查询的成本仍然过高；此外，每次查询的高延迟使这些系统不适合快速响应时间至关重要的探索性分析。

在本文中，我们提出了 OTIF，一种视频预处理器，可以有效地从大规模视频数据集中提取所有对象轨迹。通过在联合参数调整框架下集成多项优化，OTIF 能够从视频中提取所有对象轨迹，速度与现有视频查询优化器执行单个查询的速度一样快。与视频查询优化器的输出相比，OTIF 的输出是通用对象跟踪，可用于以亚秒级延迟执行许多查询。我们将 OTIF 与最近的三种视频查询优化器以及几种通用目标检测和跟踪技术进行比较，发现在多个数据集上，OTIF 将在同一视频上执行五个查询的总体成本平均降低了 6 倍到 25 倍。

papers.title: P4DB - The Case for In-Network OLTP.
papers.abstract: In this paper we present a new approach for distributed DBMSs called P4DB, that uses a programmable switch to accelerate OLTP workloads. The main idea of P4DB is that it implements a transaction processing engine on top of a P4-programmable switch. The switch can thus act as an accelerator in the network, especially when it is used to store and process hot (contended) tuples on the switch. In our experiments, we show that P4DB hence provides significant benefits compared to traditional DBMS architectures and can achieve a speedup of up to 8x.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 P4DB 的分布式 DBMS 新方法，它使用可编程交换机来加速 OLTP 工作负载。 P4DB 的主要思想是它在 P4 可编程交换机之上实现事务处理引擎。因此，交换机可以充当网络中的加速器，特别是当它用于在交换机上存储和处理热（竞争）元组时。在我们的实验中，我们表明 P4DB 与传统 DBMS 架构相比具有显着的优势，并且可以实现高达 8 倍的加速。

papers.title: Parallel Query Processing: To Separate Communication from Computation.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study parallel query processing with a focus on reducing the communication cost, which is the dominating factor in parallel query processing. The communication cost becomes large if the intermediate results between operators are large in intra-operator parallelism. In the existing approaches, it optimizes an SQL query by arranging relational algebra operators to reduce the total cost, where, for each operator, it involves (i) distribution of data partitioned to computing nodes by communication, and (ii)computation on computing nodes locally. The communication and computation are dealt with inside an operator and are not separable. In other words, it is difficult to avoid large intermediate results and hence reduce the communication cost. To reduce communication cost, we separate communication from computation using several new operators proposed in this paper. One is a pair operator () to pair the partitions of a relation R with the partitions of a relation S, where a partition is specified by a hash function. With the pair operator defined, we can explicitly deal with communication to deliver pairs of partitions to computing nodes. Together with, we can also explicitly treat the local computation on a computing node as op for any RA (relational algebra) operator op. We give a merge operator (U), to collect all partial results from computing nodes as they are. In short, with, op, and U, we are able to explicitly specify communication and computation for RA operators. Furthermore, we propose new techniques, namely, partitioning push-down and computation push-up to separate communication from computation for RA expressions. We prove that we can push-down/up for a wide range of relational expressions. We have developed a distributed system named Secco (Separate Communication from Computation) by revamping SparkSQL on Spark, and confirmed the efficiency of our approach in our performance studies using real datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究并行查询处理，重点是降低通信成本，这是并行查询处理的主导因素。如果算子之间的中间结果在算子内并行性中很大，则通信成本会变大。在现有的方法中，它通过安排关系代数运算符来优化SQL查询以降低总成本，其中对于每个运算符，它涉及（i）通过通信将分区的数据分发到计算节点，以及（ii）本地计算节点上的计算。通信和计算在算子内部处理，不可分离。换句话说，很难避免大的中间结果，从而降低沟通成本。为了降低通信成本，我们使用本文提出的几个新运算符将通信与计算分开。一种是配对运算符 ()，用于将关系 R 的分区与关系 S 的分区配对，其中分区由哈希函数指定。定义对运算符后，我们可以显式处理通信以将分区对传递到计算节点。同时，我们还可以显式地将计算节点上的本地计算视为任何 RA（关系代数）运算符 op 的 op。我们给出一个合并运算符（U），以按原样收集来自计算节点的所有部分结果。简而言之，使用、op 和 U，我们能够显式指定 RA 算子的通信和计算。此外，我们提出了新技术，即分区下推和计算上推，以将 RA 表达式的通信与计算分开。我们证明我们可以对各种关系表达式进行下推/上推。我们通过改进 Spark 上的 SparkSQL 开发了一个名为 Secco（通信与计算分离）的分布式系统，并在使用真实数据集的性能研究中证实了我们方法的效率。

papers.title: Parallel Rule Discovery from Large Datasets by Sampling.
papers.abstract: Rule discovery from large datasets is often prohibitively costly. The problem becomes more staggering when the rules are collectively defined across multiple tables. To scale with large datasets, this paper proposes a multi-round sampling strategy for rule discovery. We consider entity enhancing rules (REEs) for collective entity resolution and conflict resolution, which may carry constant patterns and machine learning predicates. We sample large datasets with accuracy bounds a and B such that at least a% of rules discovered from samples are guaranteed to hold on the entire dataset (i.e., precision), and at least B% of rules on the entire dataset can be mined from the samples (i.e., recall). We also quantify the connection between support and confidence of the rules on samples and their counterparts on the entire dataset. To scale with the number of tuple variables in collective rules, we adopt deep Q-learning to select semantically relevant predicates. To improve the recall, we develop a tableau method to recover constant patterns from the dataset. We parallelize the algorithm such that it guarantees to reduce runtime when more processors are used. Using real-life and synthetic data, we empirically verify that the method speeds up REE discovery by 12.2 times with sample ratio 10% and recall 82%.
papers.abstract_zh: 从大型数据集中发现规则通常成本高昂。当规则跨多个表共同定义时，问题变得更加惊人。为了扩展大型数据集，本文提出了一种用于规则发现的多轮采样策略。我们考虑用于集体实体解决和冲突解决的实体增强规则（REE），它可能带有恒定的模式和机器学习谓词。我们对具有准确度界限 a 和 B 的大型数据集进行采样，以便保证从样本中发现的至少 1% 的规则适用于整个数据集（即精度），并且可以从样本中挖掘整个数据集上至少 B% 的规则（即召回率）。我们还量化了样本规则及其在整个数据集上的对应规则的支持度和置信度之间的联系。为了适应集体规则中元组变量的数量，我们采用深度 Q 学习来选择语义相关的谓词。为了提高召回率，我们开发了一种表格方法来从数据集中恢复恒定模式。我们对算法进行并行化，以保证在使用更多处理器时减少运行时间。使用现实生活和合成数据，我们凭经验验证该方法在样本比 10% 和召回率 82% 的情况下将 REE 发现速度提高了 12.2 倍。

papers.title: Photon: A Fast Query Engine for Lakehouse Systems.
papers.abstract: Many organizations are shifting to a data management paradigm called the "Lakehouse," which implements the functionality of structured data warehouses on top of unstructured data lakes. This presents new challenges for query execution engines. The engine needs to provide good performance on the raw uncurated datasets that are ubiquitous in data lakes, and excellent performance on structured data stored in popular columnar file formats like Apache Parquet. Toward these goals, we present Photon, a vectorized query engine for Lakehouse environments that we developed at Databricks. Photon can outperform existing warehouses on SQL workloads and also supports the Apache Spark API. We discuss the design choices we made in Photon (e.g., vectorization vs. code generation) and describe its integration with our existing SQL and Apache Spark runtimes, its task model, and its memory manager. Photon has accelerated some customer workloads by over 10x and has recently allowed Databricks to set a new audited performance record for the official 100TB TPC-DS benchmark.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多组织正在转向称为“Lakehouse”的数据管理范式，它在非结构化数据湖之上实现结构化数据仓库的功能。这给查询执行引擎带来了新的挑战。该引擎需要在数据湖中普遍存在的原始未整理数据集上提供良好的性能，并在以流行的列式文件格式（如 Apache Parquet）存储的结构化数据上提供出色的性能。为了实现这些目标，我们推出了 Photon，这是我们在 Databricks 开发的适用于 Lakehouse 环境的矢量化查询引擎。 Photon 在 SQL 工作负载方面的性能优于现有仓库，并且还支持 Apache Spark API。我们讨论了在 Photon 中所做的设计选择（例如，矢量化与代码生成），并描述了它与我们现有的 SQL 和 Apache Spark 运行时的集成、它的任务模型以及它的内存管理器。 Photon 已将一些客户工作负载加速了 10 倍以上，并且最近让 Databricks 为官方 100TB TPC-DS 基准设定了新的经审计性能记录。

papers.title: PI2: End-to-end Interactive Visualization Interface Generation from Queries.
papers.abstract: Interactive visualization interfaces are critical in data analysis. Yet creating new interfaces is challenging, as the developer must understand the queries needed for the desired analysis task, and then design the appropriate interface. Existing task models are too abstract to be used to automatically generate interfaces, and visualization recommenders do not take the queries nor interactions into account. PI2 is the first system to generate fully functional interactive visualization interfaces from a representative sequence of task queries. PI2 analyzes queries syntactically and proposes a novel Difftree representation that encodes the systematic variations between query abstract syntax trees. PI2 then poses interface generation as a schema mapping problem from each Difftree to a visualization that renders its results, and the variations encoded in each Difftree to interactions in the interface. Interface generation further takes the layout and screen size into account. Our user studies show that PI2 interfaces are comparable to or better than those designed by developers, and that PI2 can generate exploration interfaces that are easier to use than the state-of-the-art SQL notebook products. What's more, PI2 generates high-quality interfaces within a few seconds.
papers.abstract_zh: 交互式可视化界面在数据分析中至关重要。然而，创建新接口具有挑战性，因为开发人员必须了解所需分析任务所需的查询，然后设计适当的接口。现有的任务模型过于抽象，无法用于自动生成界面，并且可视化推荐器没有考虑查询或交互。 PI2 是第一个根据任务查询的代表性序列生成功能齐全的交互式可视化界面的系统。 PI2 从语法上分析查询，并提出一种新颖的 Difftree 表示形式，对查询抽象语法树之间的系统变化进行编码。然后，PI2 将界面生成作为从每个 Difftree 到呈现其结果的可视化的模式映射问题，以及将每个 Difftree 中编码的变体映射到界面中的交互。界面生成进一步考虑了布局和屏幕尺寸。我们的用户研究表明，PI2 界面与开发人员设计的界面相当或更好，并且 PI2 可以生成比最先进的 SQL 笔记本产品更易于使用的探索界面。更重要的是，PI2 可在几秒钟内生成高质量的接口。

papers.title: PLAYPEN: Plug-and-Play Visual Graph Query Interfaces for Top-down and Bottom-Up Search on Large Networks.
papers.abstract: Visual graph query interfaces (VQI) facilitate non-programmers to query graph data effortlessly. The construction of these interfaces for large networks is typically not data-driven. That is, they do not exploit the underlying networks to automatically generate the contents of various panels of a VQI. Such data-driven construction has several benefits such as facilitating efficient top-down and bottom-up query formulation and portability of an interface across different application domains and sources. In this demonstration, we present a novel plug-and-play visual subgraph query interface construction engine called PLAYPEN that can be plugged on any large network G with a plug specification b to automatically generate the VQI for G that satisfies b by populating various components of the interface.
papers.abstract_zh: 可视化图查询接口（VQI）方便非程序员轻松查询图数据。大型网络的这些接口的构建通常不是数据驱动的。也就是说，它们不会利用底层网络自动生成 VQI 各个面板的内容。这种数据驱动的构造有几个好处，例如促进高效的自上而下和自下而上的查询制定以及跨不同应用程序域和源的接口的可移植性。在本次演示中，我们提出了一种新颖的即插即用可视化子图查询接口构建引擎，称为 PLAYPEN，它可以插入任何具有插头规范 b 的大型网络 G 上，通过填充接口的各个组件来自动生成满足 b 的 G 的 VQI。

papers.title: Plor: General Transactions with Predictable, Low Tail Latency.
papers.abstract: We present pessimistic locking and optimistic reading (PLOR), a hybrid concurrency control protocol for in-memory transaction systems that delivers high throughput and low tail latency. PLOR is especially designed for high-contention workloads: for high throughput, transactions are allowed to access records without being blocked by lock conflicts in the read phase; for low tail latency, conflict detection is delayed to the commit phase, where old transactions are always committed first using the timestamps in the lock. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach under a variety of setups (e.g., stored-procedures, interactive mode, and persistent logging, etc.). Experiments show that PLOR delivers close or comparable throughput to that of Silo and TicToc in stored-procedures, while reducing 99.9th percentile latency by 8.8x to 14.5x. In the interactive processing mode, PLOR even achieves up to 2x higher throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了悲观锁定和乐观读取（PLOR），这是一种用于内存事务系统的混合并发控制协议，可提供高吞吐量和低尾部延迟。 PLOR 专为高争用工作负载而设计：为了实现高吞吐量，允许事务访问记录，而不会在读取阶段因锁冲突而阻塞；对于低尾延迟，冲突检测被延迟到提交阶段，其中旧事务始终首先使用锁中的时间戳提交。我们在各种设置（例如存储过程、交互模式和持久日志记录等）下演示了这种方法的有效性。实验表明，PLOR 在存储过程中提供与 Silo 和 TicToc 接近或相当的吞吐量，同时将 99.9% 的延迟减少 8.8 倍到 14.5 倍。在交互式处理模式下，PLOR 甚至可以实现高达 2 倍的吞吐量。

papers.title: PreQR: Pre-training Representation for SQL Understanding.
papers.abstract: Recently, the learning-based models are shown to outperform the conventional methods for many database tasks such as cardinality estimation, join order selection and performance tuning. However, most existing learning-based methods adopt the one-hot encoding for SQL query representation, unable to catch complicated semantic context, e.g. structure of query, database schema definition and distribution variance of columns. To address such above problem, we propose a novel pre-trained SQL representation model, called PreQR, which extends the language representation approach to SQL queries. We propose an automaton to encode the query structures, and apply a graph neural network to encode database schema information conditioned on the query. A new SQL encoder is then established by adopting the attention mechanism to support on-the-fly query-aware schema linking. Experimental results on real datasets show that replacing the one-hot encoding with our query representation can significantly improve the performances of existing learning-based models on several database tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，基于学习的模型在许多数据库任务（例如基数估计、连接顺序选择和性能调整）方面表现优于传统方法。然而，大多数现有的基于学习的方法采用单热编码来表示 SQL 查询，无法捕获复杂的语义上下文，例如：查询结构、数据库模式定义和列的分布方差。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的预训练 SQL 表示模型，称为 PreQR，它将语言表示方法扩展到 SQL 查询。我们提出了一个自动机来编码查询结构，并应用图神经网络来编码以查询为条件的数据库模式信息。然后通过采用注意力机制建立一个新的 SQL 编码器来支持动态查询感知模式链接。真实数据集上的实验结果表明，用我们的查询表示替换 one-hot 编码可以显着提高现有基于学习的模型在多个数据库任务上的性能。

papers.title: Protecting Data Markets from Strategic Buyers.
papers.abstract:
The growing adoption of data analytics platforms and machine learning-based solutions for decision-makers creates a significant demand for datasets, which explains the appearance of data markets. In a well-functioning data market, sellers share data in exchange for money, and buyers pay for datasets that help them solve problems. The market raises sufficient money to compensate sellers and incentivize them to keep sharing datasets. This low-friction matching of sellers and buyers distributes the value of data among participants. But designing online data markets is challenging because they must account for the strategic behavior of participants.

In this paper, we introduce techniques to protect data markets from strategic participants, even when the asset traded is data. We combine those techniques into a pricing algorithm specifically designed to trade data. The evaluation includes a user study and extensive simulations. Together, the evaluation demonstrates how participants strategize and the effectiveness of our techniques.
papers.abstract_zh:
决策者越来越多地采用数据分析平台和基于机器学习的解决方案，这对数据集产生了巨大的需求，这解释了数据市场的出现。在运作良好的数据市场中，卖家共享数据以换取金钱，而买家则为帮助他们解决问题的数据集付费。市场筹集足够的资金来补偿卖家并激励他们继续共享数据集。卖家和买家的这种低摩擦匹配在参与者之间分配了数据的价值。但设计在线数据市场具有挑战性，因为它们必须考虑参与者的战略行为。

在本文中，我们介绍了保护数据市场免受战略参与者影响的技术，即使交易的资产是数据。我们将这些技术结合到专门为交易数据而设计的定价算法中。评估包括用户研究和广泛的模拟。总之，评估展示了参与者如何制定策略以及我们技术的有效性。

papers.title: Proteus: A Self-Designing Range Filter.
papers.abstract: We introduce Proteus, a novel self-designing approximate range filter, which configures itself based on sampled data in order to optimize its false positive rate (FPR) for a given space requirement. Proteus unifies the probabilistic and deterministic design spaces of state-of-the-art range filters to achieve robust performance across a larger variety of use cases. At the core of Proteus lies our Contextual Prefix FPR (CPFPR) model - a formal framework for the FPR of prefix-based filters across their design spaces. We empirically demonstrate the accuracy of our model and Proteus' ability to optimize over both synthetic workloads and real-world datasets. We further evaluate Proteus in RocksDB and show that it is able to improve end-to-end performance by as much as 5.3x over more brittle state-of-the-art methods such as SuRF and Rosetta. Our experiments also indicate that the cost of modeling is not significant compared to the end-to-end performance gains and that Proteus is robust to workload shifts.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Proteus，一种新颖的自行设计的近似范围过滤器，它根据采样数据进行自身配置，以便针对给定的空间要求优化其误报率 (FPR)。 Proteus 统一了最先进的范围滤波器的概率性和确定性设计空间，以在更广泛的用例中实现稳健的性能。 Proteus 的核心在于我们的上下文前缀 FPR (CPFPR) 模型 - 跨设计空间的基于前缀的滤波器的 FPR 的正式框架。我们凭经验证明了模型的准确性以及 Proteus 对合成工作负载和实际数据集进行优化的能力。我们进一步评估了 RocksDB 中的 Proteus，结果表明，与 SuRF 和 Rosetta 等更脆弱的最先进方法相比，它能够将端到端性能提高多达 5.3 倍。我们的实验还表明，与端到端性能提升相比，建模成本并不显着，而且 Proteus 对工作负载变化具有鲁棒性。

papers.title: Proteus: Autonomous Adaptive Storage for Mixed Workloads.
papers.abstract: Enterprises use distributed database systems to meet the demands of mixed or hybrid transaction/analytical processing (HTAP) workloads that contain both transactional (OLTP) and analytical (OLAP) requests. Distributed HTAP systems typically maintain a complete copy of data in row-oriented storage format that is well-suited for OLTP workloads and a second complete copy in column-oriented storage format optimized for OLAP workloads. Maintaining these data copies consumes significant storage space and system resources. Conversely, if a system stores data in a single format, OLTP or OLAP workload performance suffers. This paper presents Proteus, a distributed HTAP database system that adaptively and autonomously selects and changes its storage layout to optimize for mixed workloads. Proteus generates physical execution plans that utilize storage-aware operators for efficient transaction execution. Using comprehensive HTAP workloads and state-of-the-art comparison systems, we demonstrate that Proteus delivers superior HTAP performance while providing OLTP and OLAP performance on par with designs specialized for either type of workload.
papers.abstract_zh: 企业使用分布式数据库系统来满足同时包含事务 (OLTP) 和分析 (OLAP) 请求的混合或混合事务/分析处理 (HTAP) 工作负载的需求。分布式 HTAP 系统通常以非常适合 OLTP 工作负载的面向行的存储格式维护数据的完整副本，并以针对 OLAP 工作负载优化的面向列的存储格式维护第二个完整的数据副本。维护这些数据副本会消耗大量存储空间和系统资源。相反，如果系统以单一格式存储数据，OLTP 或 OLAP 工作负载性能就会受到影响。本文介绍了 Proteus，这是一种分布式 HTAP 数据库系统，它可以自适应、自主地选择和更改其存储布局，以针对混合工作负载进行优化。 Proteus 生成物理执行计划，利用存储感知运算符实现高效的事务执行。使用全面的 HTAP 工作负载和最先进的比较系统，我们证明 Proteus 提供卓越的 HTAP 性能，同时提供与专门针对任一类型工作负载的设计相当的 OLTP 和 OLAP 性能。

papers.title: Publication Culture and Review Processes in the Data Management Community: An Open Discussion.
papers.abstract: The Data Management community has explored many options in recent years to improve our publication culture and review processes, ranging from innovative journal-conference hybrids that decouple publication from presentation, incorporating journal-style reviewing for conference-style papers, requesting code reproducibility and code/data availability, multiple submission deadlines in a year, new categories of papers, informal shepherding processes, guidelines for diversity and inclusion, automated COI check, and so on. This panel seeks to examine our many experiments, comparing them with other CS disciplines, and help determine (i) have our experiments worked? (ii) what has their impact been? and (iii) can we do better?
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，数据管理社区探索了许多选择来改善我们的出版文化和审查流程，包括将出版与演示分离的创新期刊-会议混合体、对会议风格论文进行期刊式审查、要求代码可重复性和代码/数据可用性、一年内多次提交截止日期、新类别的论文、非正式的引导流程、多样性和包容性指南、自动 COI 检查等等。该小组旨在检查我们的许多实验，将它们与其他计算机科学学科进行比较，并帮助确定（i）我们的实验有效吗？ (ii) 它们的影响是什么？ (iii) 我们可以做得更好吗？

papers.title: Pythia: Unsupervised Generation of Ambiguous Textual Claims from Relational Data.
papers.abstract: Applications such as computational fact checking and data-to-text generation exploit the relationship between relational data and natural language text. Despite promising results in these areas, state of the art solutions simply fail in managing "data-ambiguity", i.e., the case when there are multiple interpretations of the relationship between the textual sentence and the relational data. To tackle this problem, we introduce Pythia, a system that, given a relational table D, generates textual sentences that contain factual ambiguities w.r.t. the data in D. Such sentences can then be used to train target applications in handling data-ambiguity. In this demonstration, we first show how our system generates data ambiguous sentences for a given table in an unsupervised fashion by data profiling and query generation. We then demonstrate how two existing applications benefit from Pythia's generated sentences, improving the state-of-the-art results. The audience will interact with Pythia by changing input parameters in an interactive fashion, including the upload of their own dataset to see what data ambiguous sentences are generated for it.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算事实检查和数据到文本生成等应用程序利用关系数据和自然语言文本之间的关系。尽管在这些领域取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的解决方案根本无法管理“数据歧义”，即文本句子和关系数据之间的关系存在多种解释的情况。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 Pythia，一个系统，给定一个关系表 D，生成包含事实歧义的文本句子。然后可以使用这些句子来训练目标应用程序处理数据模糊性。在此演示中，我们首先展示我们的系统如何通过数据分析和查询生成以无监督的方式为给定表生成数据歧义句子。然后，我们演示两个现有应用程序如何从 Pythia 生成的句子中受益，从而改进最先进的结果。观众将通过以交互方式更改输入参数来与Pythia进行交互，包括上传自己的数据集以查看为其生成哪些数据歧义句。

papers.title: R2T: Instance-optimal Truncation for Differentially Private Query Evaluation with Foreign Keys.
papers.abstract: Answering SPJA queries under differential privacy (DP), including graph pattern counting under node-DP as an important special case, has received considerable attention in recent years. The dual challenge of foreign-key constraints and self-joins is particularly tricky to deal with, and no existing DP mechanisms can correctly handle both. For the special case of graph pattern counting under node-DP, the existing mechanisms are correct (i.e., satisfy DP), but they do not offer nontrivial utility guarantees or are very complicated and costly. In this paper, we propose the first DP mechanism for answering arbitrary SPJA queries in a database with foreign-key constraints. Meanwhile, it achieves a fairly strong notion of optimality, which can be considered as a small and natural relaxation of instance optimality. Finally, our mechanism is simple enough that it can be easily implemented on top of any RDBMS and an LP solver. Experimental results show that it offers order-of-magnitude improvements in terms of utility over existing techniques, even those specifically designed for graph pattern counting.
papers.abstract_zh: 在差分隐私（DP）下回答 SPJA 查询，包括作为重要特例的节点 DP 下的图模式计数，近年来受到了相当大的关注。外键约束和自连接的双重挑战特别难以处理，并且现有的 DP 机制无法正确处理这两个挑战。对于节点DP下图模式计数的特殊情况，现有机制是正确的（即满足DP），但它们不能提供重要的效用保证，或者非常复杂且成本高昂。在本文中，我们提出了第一个 DP 机制，用于在具有外键约束的数据库中回答任意 SPJA 查询。同时，它实现了相当强的最优性概念，这可以被认为是实例最优性的一个小而自然的放松。最后，我们的机制非常简单，可以在任何 RDBMS 和 LP 求解器之上轻松实现。实验结果表明，与现有技术（甚至是专门为图形模式计数而设计的技术）相比，它在实用性方面提供了数量级的改进。

papers.title: Rank Aggregation with Proportionate Fairness.
papers.abstract:
Given multiple individual rank orders over a set of candidates or items, where the candidates belong to multiple (non-binary) protected groups, we study the classical rank aggregation problem subject to proportionate fairness or p-fairness (RAPF in short), considering Kemeny distance. We first study the problem of producing the closest p-fair ranking to an individual ranked order IPF in short) considering Kendall-Tau distance, and present multiple solutions for IPF. We then present two computational frameworks(a randomized randpickperm and a deterministic algpickperm) to solve RAPF that leverages the solutions of IPF as a subroutine.

We make several non-trivial algorithmic contributions: (i) we prove that when the group protected attribute is binary, IPF can be solved exactly using a greedy technique; (ii) we present two different solutions for IPF when the group protected attribute is multi-valued, algexact is optimal and algapprox admits a 2 approximation factor; (iii) we design a framework for RAPF solution with an approximation factor that is 2+ the approximation factor of the IPF solution. The resulting randpickperm and algpickperm solutions exhibit 3 and 4 approximation factors when designed using algexact and algapprox, respectively.

We run extensive experiments using multiple real world and large scale synthetic datasets and compare our proposed solutions against multiple state-of-the-art related works to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our studied problem and proposed solution.
papers.abstract_zh:
给定一组候选者或项目上的多个单独排名顺序，其中候选者属于多个（非二元）保护组，我们研究了受比例公平性或 p-公平性（简称 RAPF）影响的经典排名聚合问题，并考虑了 Kemeny 距离。我们首先研究考虑 Kendall-Tau 距离，产生与单个排名顺序 IPF 最接近的 p-fair 排名的问题，并提出 IPF 的多种解决方案。然后，我们提出两个计算框架（随机 randpickperm 和确定性 algpickperm）来求解 RAPF，该框架利用 IPF 的解决方案作为子例程。

我们做出了一些重要的算法贡献：（i）我们证明，当组保护属性是二进制时，可以使用贪心技术精确求解IPF； (ii) 当组保护属性是多值时，我们提出两种不同的 IPF 解决方案，algexact 是最优的，algapprox 允许 2 近似因子； (iii) 我们设计了一个 RAPF 解的框架，其近似因子是 IPF 解的近似因子的 2+。当使用 algexact 和 algapprox 设计时，所得的 randpickperm 和 algpickperm 解决方案分别表现出 3 和 4 个近似因子。

我们使用多个现实世界和大规模合成数据集进行了广泛的实验，并将我们提出的解决方案与多个最先进的相关工作进行比较，以证明我们研究的问题和提出的解决方案的有效性和效率。

papers.title: Redundancy Elimination in Distributed Matrix Computation.
papers.abstract: As matrix computation becomes increasingly prevalent in large-scale data analysis, distributed matrix computation solutions have emerged. These solutions support query interfaces of linear algebra expressions, which often contain redundant subexpressions, i.e., common and loop-constant subexpressions. Hence, existing compilers rewrite queries to eliminate such redundancy. However, due to the large search space, they fail to find all redundant subexpressions, especially for matrix multiplication chains. Furthermore, redundancy elimination may change the original execution order of operators, and have negative impacts. To reduce the large search space and avoid the negative impacts, we propose automatic elimination and adaptive elimination, respectively. In particular, automatic elimination adopts a block-wise search that exploits the properties of matrix computation for speed-up. Adaptive elimination employs a cost model and a dynamic programming-based method to generate efficient plans for redundancy elimination. Finally, we implement ReMac atop SystemDS, eliminating redundancy in distributed matrix computation. In our experiments, ReMac is able to generate efficient execution plans at affordable overhead costs, and outperforms state-of-the-art solutions by an order of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着矩阵计算在大规模数据分析中变得越来越普遍，分布式矩阵计算解决方案应运而生。这些解决方案支持线性代数表达式的查询接口，这些表达式通常包含冗余子表达式，即公共子表达式和循环常数子表达式。因此，现有的编译器重写查询以消除这种冗余。然而，由于搜索空间很大，他们无法找到所有冗余子表达式，特别是对于矩阵乘法链。此外，冗余消除可能会改变算子原来的执行顺序，产生负面影响。为了减少大的搜索空间并避免负面影响，我们分别提出自动消除和自适应消除。特别是，自动消除采用分块搜索，利用矩阵计算的特性来加速。自适应消除采用成本模型和基于动态规划的方法来生成有效的冗余消除计划。最后，我们在 SystemDS 之上实现 ReMac，消除了分布式矩阵计算中的冗余。在我们的实验中，ReMac 能够以可承受的管理成本生成高效的执行计划，并且性能比最先进的解决方案高出一个数量级。

papers.title: Reflections on a Career in Computer Science.
papers.abstract: Computer Science is a wonderful field with many interesting and important problems to work on. This is true today and was also true in the past; of course what is considered interesting changes as a field matures. In this talk I will discuss some of the problems that I found intriguing. In each case I will discuss the state of the field at the time I did this work to provide an historical context for my work and that of others doing related work. I will also discuss how I selected problems, what I brought to the table, and where the ideas for my solutions came from.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算机科学是一个奇妙的领域，有许多有趣且重要的问题需要解决。今天是这样，过去也是如此。当然，随着一个领域的成熟，有趣的东西也会发生变化。在这次演讲中，我将讨论一些我觉得有趣的问题。在每种情况下，我都会讨论我做这项工作时该领域的状况，为我的工作和其他从事相关工作的人提供历史背景。我还将讨论我如何选择问题、我提出了什么以及我的解决方案的想法来自哪里。

papers.title: Relative Subboundedness of Contraction Hierarchy and Hierarchical 2-Hop Index in Dynamic Road Networks.
papers.abstract: Computing the shortest path for any two given vertices is an important problem in road networks. Since real road networks are dynamically updated due to real-time traffic conditions and it is costly to recompute the oracle O in use from scratch, O needs to be updated to reflect the changes in the network using incremental algorithms. An incremental algorithm is said to be bounded if its cost is polynomial in |CHANGED|, where CHANGED comprises both the changes to the graph and the resulting changes to O. An incremental problem is bounded if it has a bounded algorithm and is unbounded otherwise. We study the boundedness of the incremental counterparts of two state-of-the-art oracles, namely contraction hierarchy (CH) and hierarchical 2-hop index (H2H). We prove that under specific computational models, both CH and H2H are unbounded to maintain. Despite this fact, we introduce relative subboundedness as an alternative to boundedness. We prove that the state-of-the-art incremental algorithm for CH is relatively subbounded, and moreover, we propose a relatively subbounded algorithm for H2H. Our experimental study on real road networks shows that the algorithms studied are faster than recomputing from scratch even when 10% of the index needs to be updated, thereby verifying the effectiveness of relative subboundedness.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算任意两个给定顶点的最短路径是道路网络中的一个重要问题。由于真实的道路网络会因实时交通状况而动态更新，并且从头开始重新计算正在使用的预言机 O 的成本很高，因此需要使用增量算法更新 O 以反映网络的变化。如果增量算法的成本是 |CHANGED| 中的多项式，则增量算法被认为是有界的，其中 CHANGED 包括对图的更改以及由此产生的 O 的更改。如果增量问题具有有界算法，则它是有界的，否则是无界的。我们研究了两个最先进的预言机的增量对应物的有界性，即收缩层次结构（CH）和层次两跳索引（H2H）。我们证明，在特定的计算模型下，CH 和 H2H 都是无界维持的。尽管如此，我们还是引入相对下界作为有界的替代。我们证明了 CH 的最先进的增量算法是相对有界的，此外，我们提出了 H2H 的相对有界的算法。我们对真实道路网络的实验研究表明，即使需要更新 10% 的索引，所研究的算法也比从头开始重新计算更快，从而验证了相对下界性的有效性。

papers.title: Remus: Efficient Live Migration for Distributed Databases with Snapshot Isolation.
papers.abstract: Shared-nothing, distributed databases scale transactional and analytical processing over a large data volume by spreading data across servers. However, static sharding of data across nodes makes such systems fail to timely adapt to changing workloads and struggle to obey the cloud pay-as-you-go model. Migrating shards between nodes online is a key technique to react to dynamic changes of workloads for cloud elasticity. Existing approaches introduce severely degraded performance and service interruption, resulting in SLA violation on the cloud; or they are tailor-made to deterministic databases. In this paper, we propose Remus, a new live migration approach for shared-nothing, distributed databases with snapshot isolation. Remus migrates shards between nodes with zero service interruption and minimal performance impact. This is achieved by an efficient unidirectional dual execution during migration. We implement Remus on a shared-nothing, distributed version of PolarDB-PG and evaluate it against state-of-the-art approaches using standard OLTP workloads TPC-C and YCSB, and hybrid workloads consisting of long-lived and short transactions. The results demonstrate Remus is the only effective approach to achieve the goal of zero transaction interruption, zero downtime and marginal performance impact, paving the way for applying the shared-nothing architecture to a cloud database which needs to provide elasticity while guaranteeing strict SLAs.
papers.abstract_zh: 无共享的分布式数据库通过跨服务器传播数据来扩展大数据量的事务和分析处理。然而，跨节点的静态数据分片使得此类系统无法及时适应不断变化的工作负载，并且难以遵守云按需付费模式。在线在节点之间迁移分片是应对工作负载动态变化以实现云弹性的关键技术。现有方法会导致性能严重下降和服务中断，导致云上的 SLA 违规；或者它们是针对确定性数据库量身定制的。在本文中，我们提出了 Remus，这是一种新的实时迁移方法，适用于具有快照隔离功能的无共享分布式数据库。 Remus 在节点之间迁移分片，实现零服务中断和最小的性能影响。这是通过迁移过程中高效的单向双重执行来实现的。我们在无共享、分布式版本的 PolarDB-PG 上实施 Remus，并使用标准 OLTP 工作负载 TPC-C 和 YCSB 以及由长寿命和短事务组成的混合工作负载，根据最先进的方法对其进行评估。结果表明，Remus 是实现零事务中断、零停机和边际性能影响目标的唯一有效方法，为将无共享架构应用于需要提供弹性同时保证严格 SLA 的云数据库铺平了道路。

papers.title: Representative Query Results by Voting.
papers.abstract:
Traditional query answering returns all answers T to a given query. When T is large, the user may be interested in viewing only a smaller subset S ⊆ T . Previous work has focused on finding subsets S that are diverse , i.e., such that all items s,s' ∈ S are very different one from another. This paper focuses on a complementary problem, namely finding subsets that are highly representative of the entire set of query results.

Intuitively, a representative subset S is similar, in values and proportionality, to the entire set T . Finding such a representative set is challenging, both conceptually, and in practice. This paper proposes a novel method of choosing a representative subset, called SimSTV, which draws inspiration from the field of voting theory. An efficient algorithm is presented, which overcomes and leverages the many differences between choosing answers in a database, and voting in a real-life election. We also provide extensions to our algorithm, e.g., to accommodate affirmative action. Experimental results show the effectiveness of our algorithm.
papers.abstract_zh:
传统的查询回答返回给定查询的所有答案 T。当 T 很大时，用户可能只对查看较小的子集 S ⊆ T 感兴趣。先前的工作重点是寻找多样化的子集 S ，即所有项目 s,s' ∈ S 彼此之间都非常不同。本文重点关注一个补充问题，即找到高度代表整个查询结果集的子集。

直观上，代表性子集 S 在值和比例方面与整个集合 T 相似。找到这样一个具有代表性的集合无论是在概念上还是在实践中都具有挑战性。本文提出了一种选择代表性子集的新方法，称为 SimSTV，该方法受到投票理论领域的启发。提出了一种有效的算法，它克服并利用了在数据库中选择答案与在现实生活中的选举中投票之间的许多差异。我们还为我们的算法提供扩展，例如，以适应平权行动。实验结果表明了我们算法的有效性。

papers.title: Reptile: Aggregation-level Explanations for Hierarchical Data.
papers.abstract:
